original_prompt: Static shot centered on a deep black background. The classic Paramount Pictures mountain logo with surrounding stars holds still in the center of frame. No camera movement. The logo is the only light source. Audio: the orchestral Paramount fanfare swells and resolves. Cinematic studio-logo style.

Static shot on deep black background. Simple white serif text reads BANTAM BOOKS PRESENTS centered in frame. No camera movement. Audio: silence underlaid with a faint electronic hum rising. Cinematic text-card style.

A tracking shot flies forward through a field of shifting black and white television static. In the distance ahead, two chrome words begin to resolve out of the noise, growing larger. Camera moves forward at accelerating speed. Audio: a low sub-bass rumble rising in pitch, threaded with the hiss of analog static. Cinematic title-approach style.

Static shot centered on a wall of shifting black and white static. The title SNOW CRASH in massive chrome neon-edged typography snaps into sharp focus at the center of frame, the static continuing to churn behind it. No camera movement. Audio: a single synthesized stab, then a sustained dark synth drone. Cinematic title-card style.

The SNOW CRASH title dissolves into streaks of red and white light that resolve into the headlight trails of a Los Angeles freeway at night seen from far above. Camera descends through the air toward the highway grid. Audio: the drone resolves into distant rushing highway sound. Cinematic transition style.

Wide aerial establishing shot of the Los Angeles basin at night, a vast glittering grid of amber franchise signs and freeway traffic stretching to the horizon. The view is dominated by the neon logos of a thousand corporate franchises burning into the sky. Camera slowly descends toward the grid. Audio: the ambient roar of distant traffic layered with a synth bassline beginning to pulse. Cinematic dystopian-establishing style.

Wide tracking shot along a strip of neon logos at night - CosaNostra Pizza, Buy n Fly, Reverend Wayne (a televangelist in a pale blue polyester suit with lacquered blond hair)'s Pearly Gates, Nova Sicilia, Mr Lee's Greater Hong Kong - each sign oversaturated and garish, stacked above parking lots. Camera tracks left to right parallel to the strip at rooftop height. Neon light paints the asphalt below. Audio: the synth bassline continues, franchise jingle fragments bleeding through. Cinematic franchise-ghetto style.

Low-angle shot looking straight up at the towering CosaNostra Pizza billboard. The face of UNCLE ENZO - a dignified Italian man in his 60s with slicked back silver hair, wearing a pinstripe suit - beams benevolently down at the viewer. Underneath reads THE MAFIA - YOU'VE GOT A FRIEND IN THE FAMILY. Camera holds static looking up. The sign is lit by its own internal glow against the night sky. Audio: a mournful distant saxophone, traffic hum below. Cinematic billboard style.

Medium shot of a black corrugated steel garage door at a CosaNostra Pizza franchise. The door rolls up rapidly with an industrial clank, revealing the dark interior of a delivery bay. A pair of cyan headlamps ignite in the darkness inside. Camera holds static. Parking lot sodium-light casts yellow glow across the concrete. Audio: the mechanical clank of the door, the low electric whine of a powerful engine waking. Cinematic reveal style.

Wide shot of a matte-black wedge-shaped high-performance car emerging from the garage bay. The car has fat contact-patch tires, a row of orange LED running lights blazing across its grille like a line of gasoline fire, and no visible driver through the blacked-out windshield. Camera tracks backward as the car rolls forward onto the parking lot. Sodium-yellow light washes across its matte body. Audio: the low thrum of an electric drivetrain, tires crunching on pavement. Cinematic vehicle-reveal style.

Medium shot inside the car cabin. HIRO PROTAGONIST - a wiry man in his late 20s, cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp Asian-shaped eyes - sits in the driver seat wearing a matte-black uniform of technical fabric with sintered armor panels at the shoulders and chest. Two samurai swords are strapped across his body, a long katana over his left shoulder and a shorter wakizashi at his hip. He is staring at a heads-up display projected on the windshield. His expression is focused and slightly manic. Camera holds static from the passenger side. Instrument glow illuminates his face in cyan. Audio: the engine thrum, a soft computerized female voice: Destination loaded. Cinematic driver-introduction style.

Close-up shot of the armored pizza compartment behind Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s head. A robotic arm slides a smart-box pizza into a slot. Red LED digits on the box's lid ignite and begin counting upward from zero zero colon zero zero. The compartment hatch folds shut like a beetle wing. Camera holds static tight on the slot. Audio: a mechanical click, the beep of the timer activating. Cinematic tech-detail style.

Close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s boot pressing down on an accelerator pedal. The cabin instrument light intensifies. Camera tilts up rapidly to his face as his expression settles into intense concentration. Audio: the engine whine climbing sharply, tires chirping, Hiro muttering: Alright let's see if we can break the franchise record tonight. Cinematic acceleration style.

Wide shot of the matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights blasting out of the CosaNostra parking lot onto a broad multi-lane neon-lit boulevard marked CSV-5. The car accelerates to extraordinary speed instantly, weaving between slower vehicles. Camera tracks alongside from the left at matching speed. Franchise signs streak past as colored light-trails. Audio: the scream of the drivetrain at full power, the Doppler-shift of passing traffic. Cinematic high-speed-pursuit style.

Low-angle tracking shot from behind the speeding car as it passes directly under the Uncle Enzo (a dignified Italian-American man in his early 70s with slicked-back silver hair, in a charcoal pinstripe three-piece suit) billboard. The illuminated face looms above. Camera tracks forward matching the car's speed. Billboard light flares across the roof of the car. Audio: the engine scream, a subliminal voice-over of Uncle Enzo speaking warmly: Thirty minutes or it's free, my friends. I personally guarantee it. Cinematic speed-pass style.

Close-up shot of the LED readout on top of the pizza box. Red digits read zero two colon zero four and climbing. Camera holds static tight on the numerals. Audio: a soft beep on each passing second. Cinematic countdown style.

Wide low-angle tracking shot of the matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights slaloming at extreme speed through dense freeway traffic, passing between trucks and bimbo-box minivans, cutting lanes without slowing. Camera tracks from ground level on the shoulder as the car rockets past. Franchise neon streaks above. Audio: the engine scream, Doppler horn blasts. Cinematic traffic-weave style.

Wide shot of a freeway exit ramp marked GILA HIGHLANDS BURBCLAVE glowing in green neon. The matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights peels off the main highway onto the ramp without braking. Camera holds static at the ramp's base. Audio: tires squealing, the engine note dropping slightly. Cinematic exit-ramp style.

Wide shot of an ornate ironwork security gate set in a manicured gatepost marking the entrance to a private Burbclave, flood-lit by cool white lamps. The Deliverator car races toward the gate at high speed. The gate swings open automatically just in time. Camera tracks the approach from the side. Audio: the engine note, the mechanical hum of the gate, a pleasant synthesized female greeting: Welcome CosaNostra Pizza, please proceed to your delivery address. Cinematic gated-community style.

Wide shot of an impossibly neat suburban cul-de-sac. Identical pastel houses with identical green lawns surround a central circle. The matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights rockets down the lane like an intruder from another world, fish-tailing around the curve. Camera holds static from an overhead porch angle. Warm porch-light glows from each house. Audio: the engine scream violating the suburban silence. Cinematic dissonance style.

Wide shot of the CosaNostra Pizza #3569 franchise building from the boulevard. The matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights screams into the delivery chute behind the building. Camera holds static on the building exterior. Neon signage blazes against the night sky. Audio: tires squealing, the engine winding down. Cinematic return style.

Close-up shot of a small sliding service window on the flank of the franchise building. Smoke curls from the edge of the window as it slides open. Through the smoke appears the sweat-shining face of an anxious Abkhazian man in a pizza-chain uniform. Camera holds static. Interior franchise light is hazy with smoke. Audio: a smoke alarm shrieking inside, the man shouting in heavily accented English: New employee put the pizza in the microwave with the foil still on, I am so sorry, please, new pizza coming. Cinematic chute-reveal style.

Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) from the driver side. His face is lit red by warning indicators on the dashboard. He closes his eyes in a slow pained exhalation. Camera holds static. The dash-red light pulses. Audio: the smoke alarm through the car's exterior speakers, Hiro muttering under his breath: You have got to be kidding me right now, twenty minutes to the Heights, this is impossible. Cinematic frustration style.

Close-up shot of the robotic loader sliding a pizza into the slot. The LED readout on the box's lid reads two zero colon zero zero bright red. The cockpit warning chime sounds. Camera holds static on the readout. Audio: an urgent beeping, the synthesized cockpit voice calmly announcing: Time critical delivery, twenty minutes to arrival window, initiate emergency route. Cinematic critical-moment style.

Close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face lit red by warning lights. His lips peel back in a silent roar of fury, knuckles white on the wheel. Camera holds static tight. Audio: his strangled shout, the timer beeping. Cinematic rage style.

Wide shot of the matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights exploding back out of the chute onto the boulevard, all its warning lights flashing full brightness, headlights strobing in autoflash mode. Camera holds static at a distance. The car leaves a streak of neon afterimage. Audio: the engine screaming to redline. Cinematic frantic-launch style.

Extreme close-up shot of a high-tech skateboard with mechanically segmented smart-wheels rolling along a stretch of asphalt. Each spoke on the wheels telescopes independently to absorb the road surface. A pair of boots in matte black enter the top of frame. Camera tracks the wheels from below. Sodium-yellow street lighting. Audio: a soft whirring of mechanical wheels, distant traffic. Cinematic gear-introduction style.

Wide low-angle tracking shot of YT - a fifteen-year-old girl with short blonde hair tucked under a black helmet, wearing a blue and orange RadiKS courier coverall covered in pockets and equipment - carving a hard turn on her skateboard down a surface street. Her expression is sharp and focused. Camera tracks backward matching her speed. Franchise neon paints her face shifting colors. Audio: the mechanical whirr of the smartwheels, her coverall rustling. Cinematic kourier-intro style.

Medium shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) skating forward, her right hand pulling a handle-and-reel device from a side pocket of her coverall. A thick cable unspools from the handle, tipped with a padded electromagnetic head the size of a salad bowl. Camera tracks her from the front at matching speed. Sodium-yellow street lighting. Audio: the reel's mechanical click, the whine of the cable extending. Cinematic gear-reveal style.

Close-up shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard)'s face inside the helmet, her eyes darting behind tinted goggles. A small heads-up display reflects in the goggle surface. Camera holds static on her face. Neon color washes cycle across the helmet visor. Audio: distant engine noise approaching. Cinematic predator-scan style.

Wide tracking shot from a low angle. YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) is on her skateboard in the curb lane. The matte-black Deliverator car comes screaming up behind her in the left lane. She whips the MagnaPoon handle in an arc over her head. The electromagnetic head flies across the lane on its cable and slams against the rear flank of the black car with a metallic THUNK, instantly sticking fast. Camera tracks from alongside. The car's orange glow illuminates YT as she hooks on. Audio: the whistle of the poon through the air, the metallic thunk of impact. Cinematic pooning style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) riding her skateboard ten feet behind the Deliverator car like a water-skier behind a speedboat, holding the reel handle with both hands, low and tight. The car accelerates to massive speed, pulling her along. Camera tracks from alongside at matching velocity. Neon franchise signs blur past. Audio: the howling wind of speed, the engine note ahead. Cinematic parasite-ride style.

Medium shot inside the car cabin. Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) glances at his rearview mirror. Through the mirror he can see YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) in her blue-and-orange coverall skate-surfing behind him. His expression shifts to furious disbelief. Camera holds static on his face. Dashboard glow. Audio: Hiro snarling: A Kourier. A goddamn Kourier hitched onto my car. Oh I am going to shake this kid off if it kills me. Cinematic realization style.

Wide tracking shot of the matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights swerving violently left and right on the boulevard, trying to shake off YT (the teenage girl with short spiky white-blonde hair, mirrored wraparound smartshades, and a black leather jacket). The car's tires screech. YT (the teenage girl with short spiky white-blonde hair, mirrored wraparound smartshades, and a black leather jacket) remains locked on, her body whipping side to side behind the car. Camera tracks from the side at matching speed. Neon franchise signs blur past. Audio: tire screams, YT (the teenage girl with short spiky white-blonde hair, mirrored wraparound smartshades, and a black leather jacket) laughing wildly. Cinematic chase-escalation style.

Medium tracking shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) reeling herself in on the poon cable until her skateboard's front wheel is under the car's rear bumper. She reaches forward with her free hand and slaps a large printed sticker onto the side window. Camera tracks from alongside at matching speed. The sticker reads in bold orange backward letters THAT WAS STALE. Audio: a mechanical slap, YT's laugh. Cinematic kourier-prank style.

Close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face through the driver window. He glances left and sees the sticker plastered on his own window, reading backward from his side THAT WAS STALE. His expression curdles. Camera holds static. Audio: Hiro furiously: Oh you little piece of work, I am so going to find out who you are. Cinematic reaction style.

Wide shot of the ornate gate of a Mews at Windsor Heights Burbclave. A small customs booth sits beside the entrance. The Deliverator car races directly at the gate. A laser flicks across the windshield, recognizes the delivery vehicle, and the gate slides open on an electromagnetic rail at the last possible second. Camera holds static at the gate. The manicured Burbclave streetlamps begin beyond. Audio: the engine note, the snap of the gate opening. Cinematic border-run style.

Medium tracking shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) still trailing the car. As she passes the gatehouse, she casually flashes her bar-code visa with one hand and waves at the uniformed TMAWH guard. The guard waves back, confused. Camera tracks alongside. Audio: the wind, YT shouting cheerfully over her shoulder: Evening officer, just hitching a ride, totally legit. Cinematic casual-infiltration style.

Low-angle shot of an ornate Burbclave street sign reading HERITAGE BOULEVARD in carved stone lettering, flood-lit. The matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights blurs past the sign. Camera holds static on the signpost. Audio: the engine scream. Cinematic passing-sign style.

Wide tracking shot of the matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights swerving off Strawbridge Place onto the driveway of a suburban house, tires tearing divots across the manicured lawn. Camera tracks backward from the far end of the lawn. A motion-sensor porch light snaps on, catching the car in harsh white light. Audio: tires ripping turf, the engine note. Cinematic yard-cut style.

Wide tracking shot from above of the matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights cutting across a backyard, over a collapsed wooden fence, into another yard. The car's path leaves twin black tire-tracks across two lawns. Camera tracks from directly overhead. Porch lights flick on across the neighborhood. Audio: the fence cracking, the engine note. Cinematic suburban-trespass style.

Wide low-angle tracking shot from the front of the car. The beam of the Deliverator headlamps sweeps across a dark backyard and finds, too late, the empty concrete pit of an unfilled swimming pool. Camera tracks backward at the car's speed. Shadows swing violently. Audio: the engine note, Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) screaming: Oh no no no pull up pull up there's a goddamn pool. Cinematic impending-crash style.

Wide shot from pool deck level. The matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights launches off the lip of the empty pool and soars out over the deep end, silhouetted briefly against the house lights behind it. Camera holds static. The car is frozen mid-air in a moment of stillness. Audio: the engine note cutting out into terrible silence. Cinematic suspended-moment style.

Wide shot of the empty swimming pool. The matte-black wedge-shaped car with fat tires and orange LED running lights slams nose-first into the far tiled wall with an explosive crash, airbags deploying in white puffs visible through the windshield. The car comes to rest in a crumpled pile at the bottom of the deep end. Camera holds static at pool deck level. Porch-light white glow. Audio: the massive concussive impact, shattering safety glass, the muffled deployment of airbags. Cinematic vehicle-crash style.

Medium tracking shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) on her skateboard, having unhooked her poon a split-second before impact. She coasts down the pool slope at a controlled speed, wheels flexing through the tile transition. She arcs around inside the empty pool like a skate ramp expert. Camera tracks from the lip of the pool. Audio: the whirr of her wheels echoing off tiled walls, YT letting out a long impressed whistle: Okay that was actually kind of awesome for a rich guy's pool. Cinematic skater-cool style.

Medium close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) slumped in the driver seat of the wrecked car. The deflating airbag has settled across his chest. His face is dazed but uninjured. The pizza box in its rack behind his head glows bright red - the LED readout showing two five colon one seven. Camera holds static inside the cabin. The dashboard lights flicker and die. Audio: the hiss of deflating airbags, a car alarm wailing far away. Cinematic crash-aftermath style.

scene_name: YT Skates Up To Crashed Car
original_prompt: Medium shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) coasting on her skateboard up to the driver-side window of the crashed car. She leans down to peer through the shattered glass at Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back). Her helmet visor is flipped up. Her expression is a mix of curiosity and pity. Camera holds static from behind her. Pool-side lights illuminate them both. Audio: the ticking of a cooling engine. Cinematic meeting-moment style.

Close-up shot of YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard)'s face at the window. She raises both eyebrows and pops her gum. Camera holds static on her. Night light cool on her skin. Audio: YT deadpan: So where's the pizza going dude, because your car is kind of totally wrecked. Cinematic deadpan-question style.

Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) reaching up, pulling the smart-box pizza from its rack, and passing it out the window to YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) through the broken glass. His movements are pained. Camera holds static. The LED on the box reads two five colon three four. Audio: Hiro urgent: White Columns Burbclave, five Oglethorpe Circle, you have four and a half minutes. YT grabbing it: Relax man I'll get it there, kouriers are faster than your fancy car anyway. Cinematic passing-the-baton style.

Close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s hand extending out the broken window holding a white business card. YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard)'s black-gloved hand snatches it from him. Camera holds static on the exchange. The card text reads HIRO PROTAGONIST - LAST OF THE FREELANCE HACKERS - GREATEST SWORDFIGHTER IN THE WORLD - STRINGER, CENTRAL INTELLIGENCE CORPORATION. Audio: Hiro grimacing: Take this. I owe you one kid. YT reading aloud skeptically: Hiro Protagonist, greatest swordfighter in the world. That is a stupid name. Hiro: Yeah well, you'll never forget it. Cinematic card-exchange style.

Wide shot from inside the pool. YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) uses the pool's curved wall as a ramp, pumping her legs to gain speed, launches out over the lip of the pool into the air, lands cleanly on the grass, and skates away into the dark neighborhood, pizza tucked under one arm. Camera holds static from pool deck level. Pool-light water-shimmer backdrop. Audio: the mechanical whirr of smartwheels, fading footfalls. Cinematic escape style.

Medium close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) in the wrecked car, watching YT (a fifteen-year-old blonde girl in a fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with a chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard)'s silhouette vanish over the lawn. A faint smile tugs at the corner of his mouth. Camera holds static. Dashboard emergency indicators reflected in his eyes. Audio: the settling sounds of the broken car, distant sirens. Cinematic quiet-beat style.

Wide shot of a well-kept suburban house. A middle-aged father in a bathrobe emerges from the back door, squinting into the dark. Above him, three children press their faces against a bedroom window. Camera holds static on the house. Warm interior light spills from the doorway. Audio: the dad shouting across the lawn furious: What in God's name is happening out here, there's a car in the pool, I am calling TMAWH security right now. Cinematic intrusion-aftermath style.

Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) climbing out through the shattered driver-side window onto the pool deck. He reaches back into the car trunk which has popped open in the crash, pulls out the long katana in its sheath and the shorter wakizashi, and straps them across his body. Camera holds static. Porch-light white wash. Audio: the scrape of steel in scabbards, approaching sirens. Cinematic arm-up style.

Wide shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) sprinting across the backyard, vaulting over a low fence, and disappearing into the dark line of trees marking the edge of the Burbclave. Camera holds static at pool deck level. Porch lights flicker on in adjacent houses. Audio: his running footfalls, the sirens arriving. Cinematic escape-on-foot style.

Wide aerial shot of a massive self-storage complex at the edge of LAX airport. The rows of corrugated-steel storage units stretch in a grid under cold sodium lamps. A 777 taxiing on the runway behind casts its landing lights across the rooftops. Camera descends slowly toward one corner unit. Audio: distant jet thrust, the hum of sodium lamps. Cinematic slum-establishing style.

Wide shot of a corrugated steel roll-up storage door. The door rolls up with an industrial clank, revealing the interior of a twenty-by-thirty foot unit turned into a home. A mattress on the floor, a cargo pallet used as a table, empty beer bottles, a single hanging light. Camera holds static outside the door. Interior light spills yellow onto the pavement. Audio: the door rolling up, a distant jet engine. Cinematic slum-home reveal style.

Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) walking into the storage-unit home, still wearing his sword-harness and torn Deliverator uniform. He tosses a beer cap onto the cargo-pallet table. Camera tracks him from outside as he crosses the threshold. Hanging bulb light illuminates his drawn face. Audio: his footsteps on concrete, his heavy exhale. Cinematic home-return style.

Medium shot of VITALY CHERNOBYL - a gaunt Ukrainian man in his late 20s, dark hair sculpted into stiff egg-white-frozen spikes, pale complexion, wearing a torn black t-shirt and leather pants - stretched unconscious on a futon, an electric guitar resting across his chest. A lower lip sore is visible. Camera holds static on the sleeping roommate. Hanging bulb light. Audio: snoring, faint distant music leaking from an unseen source. Cinematic roommate-reveal style.

Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) sitting cross-legged on the concrete floor at the cargo-pallet table. On the pallet: an expensive bottle of Puget Sound beer, his long and short swords, and a featureless matte-black wedge-shaped computer. A translucent plastic tube emerges from the computer and runs to a fiber-optic socket above Vitaly's sleeping head. Camera holds static. Overhead bulb light only. Audio: the soft hum of the computer, Vitaly's snoring. Cinematic hacker-setup style.

Close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s hands lifting a pair of sleek black wraparound goggles off the cargo pallet and placing them over his face. The lenses immediately shimmer with a light haze of internal projection. Earphones seat into his outer ears. Camera holds static on his hands and face. Hanging bulb light. Audio: a soft tone as the goggles power on, a whisper of digital wind. Cinematic goggle-up style.

Extreme close-up of the top surface of the black computer. A polished glass fisheye lens with a purplish optical coating silently rotates up out of a hidden port and clicks into place, aimed at Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face. Camera holds static. A red tracking dot sweeps across the lens. Audio: a soft mechanical click, a rising digital tone. Cinematic tech-activation style.

Static shot on pure depthless black. A single horizon line of light materializes at the bottom of the frame, running off into infinity on both sides. Camera holds static. Audio: a soft sustained digital tone rising. Cinematic transition-to-virtual style.

Wide shot of a broad boulevard stretching to the horizon across a featureless black sphere. The Street is a hundred meters wide, paved with a glowing grid, with a narrow monorail track running down its center. To either side rises a cityscape of fantastical skyscrapers covered in animated advertising and neon. Camera slowly tracks forward down the Street. Audio: the digital tone resolves into a vast ambient hum of virtual traffic. Cinematic Metaverse-reveal style.

Wide shot of the Street populated with thousands of AVATARS - human figures of every conceivable design. A giant talking phallus walks beside a medieval dragon. A stunningly beautiful off-the-shelf female avatar strolls past a flickering grainy black-and-white public-terminal avatar. Camera tracks alongside the foot traffic. The avatars cast multicolored glows on the pavement. Audio: layered chatter in a hundred languages, snippets of jingles. Cinematic digital-crowd style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO'S AVATAR - identical to Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s real face but wearing a black leather kimono, two samurai swords at his waist, cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, Asian eyes. He walks down the Street with an easy confident gait. Camera tracks backward at matching speed. His avatar casts a sharp crisp shadow. Audio: his virtual footfalls, crowd ambience. Cinematic hero-avatar style.

Wide shot of the Street. A fighter jet animercial bursts into flame in mid-air overhead, plummets toward Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back), and explodes in a three-dimensional fireball right in front of him. The fire resolves into a pale skinny hacker in a corporate windbreaker floating in midair. Camera holds static. The explosion lights Hiro's face. Audio: a supersonic scream, a concussive boom, the pitchman beginning slick and fast: Hiro, I can't understand why a man of your talents is still renting time on outdated hardware. Cinematic animercial style.

Medium tracking shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) walking straight through the pitchman avatar, which dissolves into pixels and vanishes. Hiro never breaks stride. Camera tracks alongside. Audio: the pitchman's voice cutting off mid-sentence. Cinematic dismissal style.

scene_name: Hiro Walks Into The Black Sun

Medium two-shot of Juanita (a Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair and olive skin) and Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) in the Hacker Quadrant. Close-up shot of Juanita (a Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair and olive skin)'s black-and-white face. Her expression is grave. Camera holds static. Medium shot of Juanita (a Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair and olive skin) extending a small white hypercard toward Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back). Medium tracking shot of Juanita (a Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair and olive skin) turning and walking away from Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back), back toward the entrance. Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) sitting down at Daid's table as Juanita (a Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair and olive skin) leaves. Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) leaning forward over the table toward Daid. The light grows. Audio: the ambient club hum drops out, replaced by a deep bass hum rising from the card. Cinematic point-of-no-return style.

Medium shot of Daid at his table. From the torn halves of the hypercard a shimmering avatar materializes - a stark naked BRANDY, a cheap off-the-shelf female avatar with ludicrously exaggerated proportions, crude ruby lipstick, and half-inch chip-like eyelashes. In her hands she holds a pair of tubes - a rolled scroll. Camera holds static. Her avatar is clearly a knockoff, jittering slightly. Audio: a synthesized feminine chuckle, the club ambience muted. Cinematic trap-sprung style.

Medium shot of the Brandy leaning forward and pressing her crude ruby lips to Daid's ear. Her mouth moves but her words are inaudible through ambient noise. Close-up shot of the Brandy spreading the pair of tubes apart in front of Daid's face, unrolling them into a flat two-dimensional rectangular display the size of a small flat-screen. Blue snow-light floods his features. Audio: a high-pitched hiss of analog static, a sub-bass thrum beneath. Cinematic visual-infection style.

Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) lunging across the table, reaching for the scroll. Medium close-up shot of Daid's face. He smiles weakly and waves a hand, trying to act normal. But his eyes have not quite refocused. Camera holds static. A thin line of sweat appears on his temple. Extreme close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) lifting the goggles toward his eyes, then stopping just short. Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) carefully placing the still-active goggles face-down on the floor, his hand trembling slightly. Wide shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) seated on a cushion in the top of a turret room at Daid's house, a bottle of beer in his hand, looking out over Los Angeles. Wide shot of the U-Stor-It complex at dawn. A jetliner taxis across the parking lot view. Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) sitting cross-legged at his cargo-pallet desk again. Close-up shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) seated at his mahogany desk. He speaks softly. Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) holding up the Babel Infocalypse hypercard to the Librarian (the silver-bearded fiftyish AI daemon in a V-neck sweater and wool tie). Close-up shot of the Librarian (the silver-bearded fiftyish AI daemon in a V-neck sweater and wool tie)'s face. His bright blue eyes crinkle in an anticipatory smile. Camera holds static. Soft light. Wide aerial shot of the Los Angeles basin at dawn, pulling slowly back and up into the sky. The city stretches beneath, the franchise ghettos already glowing faintly even in morning light. The distant ocean catches the first rays of sun. Camera pulls back and up, becoming aerial. Audio: the synth-orchestral theme swells, resolves into ambient drone. Cinematic act-break style.

Wide shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s metaverse office. Medium shot of Hiro (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) reaching out a hand through the floating blizzard of hypercards. Camera holds static. Desk lamp light. Audio: Fixer: Compton to Griffith. Delivery same as last time. Different customer. Cinematic handler style.

Close-up shot of the Fixer's hand sliding a small stainless-steel cylinder across the desk. The cylinder is unmarked, sealed at both ends with red wax. Camera holds static on the cylinder. Desk lamp light. Audio: the hiss of steel on wood. Cinematic contraband-handoff style.

Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s gloved hand taking the cylinder and zipping it into a reinforced thigh pocket of her coverall. Camera holds static on the pocket. Soft light. Audio: the zip. Cinematic stash style.

Medium shot of the Fixer leaning back, expression flat. Camera holds static. Desk light. Audio: Fixer: Don't pop the seal. Don't drop it. Reverend Wayne is expecting. Enzo says hi. Cinematic warning-brief style.

Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) giving a slight nod. She pats the pocket. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: her quiet: Got it. Cinematic go-time style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) kicking her skateboard up from the parquet, walking back through the reception area and out the glass door. Camera tracks behind. Warm interior to hot exterior. Audio: her bootsteps, the bell. Cinematic departure style.

Wide shot of the entrance to the Sacrament container port. A chain-link gate stands open, a franchise security guard dozing in a booth. HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) rolls through on his bike. Camera holds wide. Morning light, industrial rust. Audio: the hum of his motor, distant cranes. Cinematic port-entry style.

Wide shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) weaving the motorcycle between towering stacks of rusted shipping containers. The stacks loom on either side like steel cliffs, painted with faded corporate logos. Camera tracks behind. Shafts of low sun break between the stacks. Audio: his motor echoes, a container groans metallically somewhere. Cinematic industrial-maze style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) riding past a makeshift Russian refugee camp inside the container rows. Ragged figures squat around small fires between the stacks, some watching him pass with dead eyes. Lines of laundry strung between containers. Camera tracks alongside. Morning light dulled by smoke. Audio: soft Russian conversation, a child crying, his motor. Cinematic displaced-persons style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) slowing the bike, rolling to a stop in an empty aisle between two container stacks. He looks up. Camera holds static. Light from above. Audio: his motor powering down, wind between the stacks. Cinematic arrival-stop style.

Low-angle tracking shot looking up the side of a container stack. Perched on top, silhouetted against the sky, is NGUGI THE GARGOYLE (a pale thin Kenyan man in his 40s bristling with surveillance gear - his head half-obscured by a massive black goggle-array, multiple cameras clipped around his skull, antennae jutting at odd angles, cables snaking between equipment, a portable computer clipped at his belt, a laryngeal mic at his throat). Camera tilts up to catch him. Backlit by morning sun. Audio: the faint whine of his cooling fans. Cinematic surveillance-human-reveal style.

Medium shot of the gargoyle from slightly above his perch. He turns his goggled face down at Hiro with mild annoyance. Camera holds static on his face. Flat backlight. Audio: the constant soft hum of his rig, his tired muttered: Yeah, yeah, I see you. Cinematic gargoyle-closeup style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) on the ground looking up at the gargoyle, hand shading his eyes. Camera holds on Hiro. Bright morning light. Audio: Hiro shouting up: Ngugi. I need information. Gargoyle: You're not on my list. Hiro: I'll trade. Cinematic negotiation-begins style.

Close-up shot of the gargoyle's goggled face, a faint distorted reflection of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) visible in the lenses. His mouth twitches. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: Gargoyle: I'm listening. Cinematic information-trader style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) on the ground with arms folded. Camera holds static. Low light. Audio: Hiro: I have unpublished stringer data on the Raft. Rife's personal guard movements. Three fresh sources. I want everything you have on L. Bob Rife. And on a bike courier named YT. Cinematic data-barter style.
Close-up of the gargoyle nodding once, tapping at a small keypad at his waist. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: the tap-tap of tiny keys. Cinematic agreement style.

Close-up shot of the gargoyle raising a stubby data-wand toward HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back). A green laser pulse flickers briefly, information burst. Camera holds static on the wand. Backlight. Audio: a rapid high-pitched data squeal. Cinematic data-burst style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) tapping his wrist computer as the data lands. A tiny confirmation icon blinks. Camera holds static. Morning light. Audio: a soft confirmation beep. Cinematic data-received style.

Close-up of the gargoyle leaning down from his perch. His goggles catch the sun like insect eyes. Camera holds static. Backlight. Audio: Gargoyle quietly: The concert tonight. The Chernobyl show. Don't go. Your friend Da5id. Your friend Lagos. Anyone who gets close to Rife's story. It stops being coincidence. Cinematic cryptic-warning style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s unimpressed face. His jaw tightens. Camera holds static. Flat light. Audio: Hiro: I know. That's why I'm going. Cinematic resolve style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) mounting the motorcycle and riding back down the container aisle. The gargoyle watches from his perch. Camera holds wide. Morning light. Audio: his motor fading. Cinematic exit style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) skating up the winding road toward Griffith Park. The park rises green against the brown hills. Camera tracks alongside. Bright midmorning light. Audio: the zip of smartwheels, birdsong. Cinematic approach style.

Wide shot of the Reverend Wayne's Pearly Gates parking lot - a lot full of pickup trucks and family sedans, with a colossal franchise building in the shape of a white neon-edged gate rising behind it. YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) glides through the lot. Camera tracks. Hot light. Audio: distant amplified organ music. Cinematic franchise-church style.

Medium shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) kicking her skateboard up and walking through the Pearly Gates front doors. The lobby is all mirrored chrome and white marble. Camera tracks her. Cool interior. Audio: organ music swells inside. Cinematic entry style.

Wide shot of the Pearly Gates lobby. A long white counter stretches across the back. A line of worshippers waits. Behind the counter, three COUNTER GIRLS (young women in white pantsuits with small wireless headsets) process customers. Camera holds wide. Bright institutional light. Audio: a hushed line murmur, organ music, soft beeps. Cinematic service-counter style.

Medium tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) skipping the line entirely, walking toward a side door marked CLERGY ONLY. Camera tracks her. Bright light. Audio: her bootsteps on marble. Cinematic bypass style.

Medium shot of a side door opening. REVEREND WAYNE (a sweating middle-aged televangelist with lacquered bright blond hair, a fleshy face, a pale blue polyester suit, silver crucifix, wet eager eyes) steps through, gesturing for YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) to come in. Camera holds static on the doorway. Cool light. Audio: his treacly voice: Child, come in, come in. Cinematic televangelist-reveal style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) following the Reverend through the door into a plush pastel-pink office. A large white desk dominates the room, a massive illuminated cross on the wall behind it. Camera tracks her. Pink light. Audio: the door closes softly. Cinematic private-office style.

Medium shot of REVEREND WAYNE (the lacquered-blond televangelist in the pale blue polyester suit) seating himself behind the white desk, producing a chrome device that looks like a small respirator with a glass vial chamber. He sets it on the desk. Camera holds static. Pink light. Audio: the soft clink of glass on marble. Cinematic ritual-setup style.

Close-up shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s hand placing the red-wax-sealed steel vial on the desk beside the respirator. Camera holds tight. Pink light. Audio: the click of steel on marble. Cinematic handoff style.

Close-up shot of REVEREND WAYNE (the sweating televangelist)'s trembling hands cracking the red wax seal, tipping a clear watery liquid from the vial into the chamber of the respirator. Camera holds tight. Pink desk light. Audio: the snap of wax, the slosh of liquid. Cinematic loading style.

Medium shot of REVEREND WAYNE (the lacquered-blond televangelist) pressing the respirator to his face, inhaling deeply through his nose. His eyes roll back. His mouth falls open. A trickle of saliva hangs from his chin. He sways in his chair. Camera holds static. Pink light. Audio: a long hissing inhale, then guttural nonsense syllables bubbling from his throat - DU-GA-SAR-SA-MU-GA - Cinematic possession style.

Close-up shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s visor-helmet as she takes a sharp step back. Through the visor her eyes widen. Camera holds static. Pink light. Audio: her sharp intake of breath, his continuing glossolalia underneath. Cinematic horror-reaction style.

Wide shot of the office side door opening. A COUNTER GIRL (a young woman in a white Pearly Gates pantsuit, white headset) enters calmly, not reacting to the Reverend's state, and takes a small vial of her own from her pocket. Camera holds wide. Pink light. Audio: her even: My turn Reverend. Reverend still babbling. Cinematic cult-normalization style.

Medium shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) backing toward the exit, one hand going to the doorframe. Camera holds static. Pink light. Audio: her low: Okay, bye. Cinematic escape-prep style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) turning and pushing through the door back into the lobby, walking fast. Camera tracks. Pink to bright white light. Audio: the door thud, her accelerating bootsteps. Cinematic flee style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) exiting the Pearly Gates building into the hot parking lot. She drops her skateboard and rolls. Camera tracks her. Bright midday light. Audio: the board clack, smartwheels zipping. Cinematic escape style.

Wide shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) braking hard behind a parked van, leaning against it, pulling off her helmet. Her blonde hair falls loose, sweat on her forehead. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: her fast breathing. Cinematic recovery style.

Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s hand pulling out her personal smartphone and thumbing a number. Camera holds tight. Hot light. Audio: the tap of keys, distant traffic. Cinematic call-prep style.

Medium shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) holding the phone to her ear, leaning against the van. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: the ringback tone. Cinematic call-placed style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) on his motorcycle on the freeway. His earpiece chirps. He taps it. Camera tracks. Midday light. Audio: Hiro: Talk. Cinematic mobile-answer style.

Medium shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) against the van, speaking into her phone. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: YT: I just saw a Reverend eat a vial of something the Mafia paid me to deliver. He started talking in - I don't know. Not tongues. Something. Cinematic fast-report style.

Intercut medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) on the freeway, riding one-handed, listening intently. Camera tracks. Wind. Audio: Hiro: Glossolalia. Was it clear liquid. Small steel vial. YT off-screen: Yeah. Cinematic phone-interrogation style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) pulling the bike onto the freeway shoulder, slowing to a stop. Camera tracks. Midday sun. Audio: his motor idling down. Cinematic pull-over style.

Close-up shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face in profile against the smog-bright sky. His expression has gone still. Camera holds static. Bright light. Audio: Hiro: You delivered Snow Crash. YT off-screen: What. Hiro: That's what it is. You delivered it. Cinematic revelation style.

Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s face. Her mouth is a tight line. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: YT: The Mafia is moving Snow Crash. Hiro off-screen: Looks like. Or using a front. Cinematic betrayal-anger style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) on the shoulder, staring at the horizon. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: Hiro: I need you to find out where the vials come from. Not who hires you. Where the stuff is MADE. YT off-screen: Fine. What's it worth. Hiro: I'll pay. Cinematic partnership-deepens style.

Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s phone screen as she thumbs the disconnect. The screen shows CALL ENDED - 02:14. Camera holds tight. Hot light. Audio: a soft disconnect tone. Cinematic call-end style.

Wide aerial shot of Griffith Park from the air at sunset. The amphitheater sits in its bowl of hills, already lit with purple and green stage lights. Around the perimeter, thousands of parked motorcycles catch the dying light. Camera descends slowly. Audio: the distant whine of test amplifiers, a drifting bassline. Cinematic concert-establish style.

Wide shot of the concert parking lot - a sea of motorcycles, ratty vans, and ex-Soviet military trucks. Crowds of young people mill among them, most with shaved heads, torn coveralls, glowsticks. Camera holds wide. Purple stage-light wash. Audio: distant amplified music, crowd noise, revving bikes. Cinematic concert-crowd style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) on his motorcycle threading through the parked bikes. He still wears his katana. Heads turn as he passes. Camera tracks alongside. Colored light. Audio: his quiet motor over the crowd noise. Cinematic hero-arrival style.

Wide shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) parking his bike under a eucalyptus tree at the edge of the lot. He dismounts. Camera holds static. Twilight. Audio: his boots on dirt. Cinematic park-up style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) standing beside his bike, pulling up a tiny pair of binocular-spectacles from his jacket. He scans the crowd through them. Camera holds static. Purple light. Audio: the soft whirr of spec motors, crowd noise. Cinematic recon style.

Wide shot of the main gate to the amphitheater - a chainlink funnel with six security troopers in Rife Industries black coveralls. Fans stream through being scanned. Camera holds wide. Harsh floodlight. Audio: security barks, guitar feedback from the stage. Cinematic entry-gate style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) holding up a holographic press pass labeled STRINGER CIC to a bored security trooper. Camera holds tight. Floodlight. Audio: the pass chirps authentication. Cinematic credential style.

Medium shot of a shaven-headed Rife security trooper in black coveralls and mirrored wraparound shades jerking his thumb toward the gate. Camera holds static. Floodlight. Audio: Trooper: Move. Cinematic bored-authority style.

Wide shot inside the amphitheater. Thousands of fans pack the grass bowl, facing a colossal stage where a tech crew tests lights. Lasers sweep the sky overhead. Camera pans slowly. Deep purple twilight. Audio: a massive crowd, amplified drum-machine test, subwoofer thuds. Cinematic concert-crowd-inside style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) pushing forward through the crowd, his katana marking him out. People step aside, some stare. Camera tracks behind him. Colored sweep lights. Audio: a crowd babble of Russian, English, Spanish. Cinematic navigation style.

Wide shot of a mixing tower scaffold halfway through the crowd. HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) starts climbing up the outside. Camera tilts up with him. Colored light. Audio: his boots on metal rungs. Cinematic ascent style.

Wide shot from atop the mixing tower. HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) stands at the railing, overlooking the crowd and stage. Camera holds wide from behind him. Twilight. Audio: crowd noise below. Cinematic overwatch style.
Wide shot of the amphitheater as the stage lights kill to black. The crowd roars. Camera holds wide. Deep black. Audio: a massive crowd scream. Cinematic darkness-before-show style.

Wide shot of a single white spotlight punching down onto center stage. A microphone stand stands alone. The crowd roar rises. Camera holds wide. Single light. Audio: a building bass rumble under the crowd. Cinematic pre-reveal style.

Medium shot of VITALY CHERNOBYL (a gaunt Ukrainian man in his 20s with tall egg-white spiked hair, a cold sore on his lip, wearing a ripped black t-shirt and torn black jeans) walking out of the stage darkness into the single spotlight, guitar slung over his shoulder. He is gaunt, shirtless under a torn leather vest, his egg-white spiked hair catching the light. Behind him four more pale Ukrainian musicians materialize at instruments. Camera holds static. Spotlight. Audio: the crowd roar reaches fever pitch. Cinematic frontman-entrance style.

Close-up shot of VITALY CHERNOBYL (a gaunt Ukrainian man in his 20s with tall egg-white spiked hair, a cold sore on his lip, wearing a ripped black t-shirt and torn black jeans)'s face at the microphone. His mouth is at the mesh. His eyes are closed. Camera holds tight. White spotlight. Audio: the crowd noise begins to drop. Cinematic frontman-closeup style.

Wide shot of the stage. VITALY CHERNOBYL (a gaunt Ukrainian man in his 20s with tall egg-white spiked hair, a cold sore on his lip, wearing a ripped black t-shirt and torn black jeans) slams the first chord. The entire stage lighting rig explodes into life - green lasers sweep over the crowd, strobe whites flash. Camera holds wide. Chaos light. Audio: a wall of distorted guitar hits like a hammer. Cinematic show-begins style.

Wide shot from the mixing tower of the crowd pumping fists, surging forward against the stage barrier. Camera holds wide. Strobe. Audio: the opening Chernobyl song thunders out - tribal drums under distorted guitar, Vitaly screaming Ukrainian lyrics. Cinematic concert-riot style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) atop the tower, binocular-spectacles to his eyes, sweeping across the crowd. Camera holds static. Strobe-wash on his face. Audio: the song continues, his soft muttering: Where are you. Cinematic search style.

Wide shot of the distant edge of the parking lot behind the amphitheater. Headlights approach - a single massive Harley-Davidson rumbling slowly up the dirt access road, its rider's silhouette huge. Camera holds wide. Moonlight. Audio: the deep throb of a big twin engine over the distant concert. Cinematic antagonist-arrival style.

Medium shot of the Harley stopping. RAVEN (a massive Aleut man nearly seven feet tall with long straight black hair down his back, a Fu Manchu mustache, and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL tattooed across his forehead, wearing black leather jacket and jeans, riding a custom black Harley-Davidson with a sealed silver sidecar) swings a massive leg over and off. The sidecar attached to the bike is a sleek silver pod, sealed, warning-triangled. Camera holds static. Moonlight. Audio: the engine dying to silence, his heavy boots crunching on gravel. Cinematic villain-entrance style.

Close-up shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers)'s face in moonlight. The POOR IMPULSE CONTROL tattoo is clearly visible across his forehead. His Fu Manchu mustache hangs over his mouth. His black eyes scan toward the stage lights. Camera holds static. Moonlight. Audio: distant concert muffled. Cinematic villain-closeup style.

Medium shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) placing a massive hand on the sealed silver sidecar. A small radiation-trefoil symbol is stenciled on its flank. Camera holds static. Moonlight. Audio: his deep quiet breath, a crow somewhere. Cinematic ominous-check style.

Wide tracking shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) striding up the access road toward a back-service gate of the amphitheater. His size is unmistakable even at distance - he towers over everyone. Camera tracks from behind. Moonlight and distant stage glow. Audio: his slow heavy footfalls, crowd roar growing. Cinematic approach style.

Medium shot of a Rife Industries security guard at a back gate. He is a large man, not small. RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) approaches him. Camera holds static on the guard. Floodlight. Audio: Guard: Badge. Cinematic checkpoint style.

Low-angle two-shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) standing over the guard. The guard's face goes from skeptical to uncertain to pale. The POOR IMPULSE CONTROL tattoo is obvious. Camera holds low. Floodlight on both. Audio: Raven quietly: I'm with the band. Cinematic intimidation style.

Medium shot of the guard stepping aside and waving RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) through the gate without another word. Camera holds static. Floodlight. Audio: the crowd roar past him. Cinematic bypass style.

Close-up shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s binocular-spectacles swinging back and locking onto a tall figure in black moving through the crowd. The digital viewfinder crosshairs lock. Camera holds tight. Purple light. Audio: a soft electronic lock-tone. Cinematic target-acquire style.

Wide shot through the crowd. RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) moves through the fans toward the stage, a head taller than anyone. He does not push. The crowd parts for him. Camera tracks. Strobe-wash. Audio: the ongoing song, the crowd's general roar. Cinematic villain-through-crowd style.

Close-up shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) behind the specs. He lowers them. His face is tight. Camera holds static. Purple light. Audio: Hiro quietly: Raven. You are shitting me. Cinematic recognition style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) swinging off the side of the mixing tower, climbing down fast. Camera tracks him. Colored light. Audio: his boots on metal. Cinematic pursuit-begin style.

Wide shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) reaching the front barricade. He stops, watches the band on stage. A few concertgoers look up at him, step away. Camera holds wide. Stage light. Audio: song at full volume. Cinematic standoff-prep style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) shoving through the packed crowd toward the front. People complain but move. Camera tracks behind him. Strobe. Audio: his sharp apologies, song blast. Cinematic pursuit style.

Medium shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) at the front barricade. He slowly turns his head. His eyes track across the crowd and lock onto something. Camera holds static on his face. Stage light strobe. Audio: song continues. Cinematic predator-sense style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) stopping mid-crowd, twenty feet from RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers). The crowd surges around them. Camera holds static on Hiro. Strobe. Audio: song blasting. Cinematic freeze style.

Two medium shots intercut. RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers)'s face - still, alert, amused. HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face - wary, hand resting near the katana pommel over his shoulder. Camera cuts between them. Strobe. Audio: song pounds between cuts. Cinematic showdown-eye-lock style.

Close-up of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) slowly smiling, showing yellowed teeth. His Fu Manchu mustache lifts. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: song. Cinematic menace style.

Wide shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) turning deliberately and walking back through the crowd toward the exit, not breaking eye contact with HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) until he has to. Camera tracks him. Strobe. Audio: song. Cinematic retreat-as-threat style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) pushing after RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) through the crowd. Camera tracks behind. Colored light. Audio: song blasting. Cinematic pursuit-renewed style.

Wide tracking shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) striding out of the main gate, HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) sixty feet behind him. The security troopers watch blankly. Camera tracks behind both. Floodlight. Audio: song muffled now, crowd roar behind. Cinematic chase-exterior style.

Wide shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) reaching his Harley with its sealed silver sidecar. He swings on, kicks the starter. Camera holds wide. Moonlight. Audio: the big twin engine thunders to life. Cinematic getaway-prep style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) sprinting across the parking lot toward his own parked motorcycle under the eucalyptus. Camera tracks him. Floodlight and shadow. Audio: his running footsteps, Harley rumble in distance. Cinematic parallel-bike style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) swinging onto his electric bike and firing it up. Camera holds static. Moonlight. Audio: the whine of the motor. Cinematic mount-up style.

Wide tracking shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers)'s Harley with sidecar peeling out of the access road in a spray of dirt. Camera tracks behind. Tail-light red. Audio: the roar of the Harley. Cinematic villain-escape style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s electric bike chasing the Harley down the winding park road. Camera tracks from high angle. Moonlight. Audio: whine of electric vs rumble of internal combustion. Cinematic bike-chase style.

Close-up shot of RAVEN (the massive long-haired Aleut with Fu Manchu mustache and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers)'s face in profile as he rides. His eyes flick to a wing mirror. Wind whips his long black hair. Camera holds tight. Moonlight. Audio: wind and Harley. Cinematic villain-aware style.

Wide shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s suburban bedroom at late morning. Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s face as she stares at the unknown source marker. Her jaw sets. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: her quiet: I can work with that. Cinematic resolve style.

Wide shot of HIRO (a lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp Asian-shaped eyes, wearing a black arachnofiber Deliverator jumpsuit with a katana and wakizashi strapped across his back)'s metaverse office - a high open room with sandstone walls and a view of the virtual sky. Medium shot of THE LIBRARIAN (a silver-bearded fiftyish man with bright blue eyes in a V-neck sweater over a tweed work shirt and coarse wool tie) standing beside Hiro, gesturing at a floating dossier. Close-up of a floating hypercard showing black-and-white stock footage of a 1972 American underground nuclear test - a mushroom of earth rising from a tundra test site. Camera holds tight. Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) reading another hypercard. Camera tracks his eye. Warm light. Close-up of a hypercard showing diagrams of a glass knife - curved borosilicate blade, razor-thin, invisible to metal detectors. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Medium shot of another hypercard expanding in front of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) - a photo of Raven and L. Close-up shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face going still. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Hiro: You are kidding. Librarian offscreen: I do not kid sir. Cinematic dread style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) pacing rapidly around the virtual office, hands linked behind his head. Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) stopping. His face hardens. Camera holds static. Warm light. Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) skating through the downtown LA franchise sprawl at midday. Close-up shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s face. She is listening carefully. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: silence, a clock ticking somewhere. Cinematic attentive style.

Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s face as an idea visibly crosses her expression. Her mouth quirks. Camera holds tight. Amber light. Audio: her soft: Oh okay. Cinematic opportunity style.

Wide shot of the KOWLOON yacht from above as its horn blasts a single long note. Crew scramble to cast off lines. Camera holds wide. Dusk. Audio: the horn, engines rising. Cinematic departure-signal style.

Wide tracking shot of the tender being lifted by the yacht's stern davit crane, swinging up and onto a cradle on the stern deck. YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) still hidden under the tarp. Camera tracks the tender. Dusk. Audio: crane whine, chain clink. Cinematic mechanical-lift style.

scene_name: YT Realizes She Is Being Taken
original_prompt: Close-up shot under the tarp of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s face as she feels the tender lift and swing. Her eyes widen then narrow. Camera holds tight. Dim amber. Audio: her tiny: Okay. Pivot. Cinematic oh-shit style.

Wide aerial shot of the KOWLOON sliding away from the dock, leaving a wake in the oily water. Rife security on the upper deck watch the shore shrink. Camera pans from above. Dusk. Audio: a steady throaty engine, gulls. Cinematic ocean-bound style.
Wide aerial shot of the yacht clearing the Long Beach breakwater, ocean opening before it. Camera pans. Deep blue dusk. Audio: deep hum of propulsion, wind. Cinematic open-sea style.

Wide aerial shot pulling up and back from the yacht as it heads west into a deep red sunset over open Pacific ocean. Camera pulls up until the yacht is a small white shape. Red-gold. Audio: only wind and wave now. Cinematic ocean-sunset style.

Close-up shot under the tarp as YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor) lifts the canvas a half-inch to peek. Open dark ocean in all directions. Camera holds tight. Amber light from running lamps. Audio: engine hum, waves. Cinematic hidden-peek style.

Close-up of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the blue-and-orange Kourier coverall with chrome visor)'s face under the tarp. Her lips silently form the word: FUCK. Camera holds tight. Dim amber. Audio: only her breathing. Cinematic stranded style.

Wide aerial shot pulling up and away from the yacht, which becomes a single running light moving across a vast dark Pacific. Stars beginning to show. Camera pulls up until Earth curves visible in frame. Audio: a dark synth drone rising. Cinematic act-break style.

Wide aerial shot of the U-Stor-It storage facility in the early morning haze. Rows of orange roll-up doors, most still closed. The sun is a pale disc behind the smog. Camera descends slowly toward one particular unit in the center row. Audio: distant traffic hum, a morning bird. Cinematic morning-establish style.

Medium shot inside the dim storage unit. HIRO (a lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp Asian-shaped eyes, wearing a black arachnofiber Deliverator jumpsuit with a katana and wakizashi strapped across his back) lies on a narrow cot in a sleeping bag, katana propped within reach, hair mussed. Morning light filters through cracks in the roll-up door. Camera holds static. Audio: his slow steady breathing, distant traffic. Cinematic hero-at-rest style.

Close-up of a black handset on a wooden crate beside the cot, vibrating. The screen shows INCOMING - JUANITA. Camera holds tight on the phone. Soft morning light. Audio: an electronic ring-buzz. Cinematic call-incoming style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) rolling over and grabbing the phone without sitting up, pressing it to his ear. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: his sleepy: Yeah. Cinematic answer-half-asleep style.

Close-up shot of a small holo-screen floating above the phone showing JUANITA MARQUEZ (a Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair, olive skin, dark eyes, wearing a plain grey t-shirt and jeans). She looks tired, urgent. Camera holds tight on the projection. Pale blue screen-light. Audio: Juanita: Hiro. Wake up. I'm coming to see you. I have thirty minutes. Cinematic videocall-urgent style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) pushing himself upright, fully alert now. Camera holds static. Morning light on his face. Audio: the rustle of the sleeping bag, his: Where are you. Cinematic alertness-return style.

Close-up of the holo-screen. Juanita over her shoulder, walking fast through some kind of concrete corridor. Camera holds tight. Blue screen light. Audio: Juanita: Parking lot. Two minutes. Don't say my name to anyone. Cinematic clandestine-call style.
Close-up of the holo-screen collapsing to a point and vanishing. Camera holds tight. Dim interior. Audio: a soft electronic chirp. Cinematic call-end style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) already on his feet, pulling his Deliverator jumpsuit up over his shoulders in quick practiced movements. Camera tracks him. Morning light. Audio: the crinkle of arachnofiber, his quick breathing. Cinematic gear-up style.

Close-up shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s hand slinging the katana's harness across his shoulders, buckling it at the chest. Camera holds tight on the buckle. Soft light. Audio: the click of the buckle. Cinematic weapon-ready style.

Wide shot from outside as the orange roll-up door of the unit grinds up, HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) ducking out into the morning light. He pulls on wraparound shades. Camera holds wide. Pale sun. Audio: the grind of the door, his boots on concrete. Cinematic exit-storage style.

Wide shot of a nondescript silver hatchback pulling into the aisle between storage units, stopping sharp. JUANITA MARQUEZ (a Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair, olive skin, dark eyes, wearing a plain grey t-shirt and jeans) gets out quickly, carrying a small black box. Camera holds wide. Morning light. Audio: the slam of the car door, her fast steps. Cinematic arrival-urgent style.

Medium tracking shot of Juanita walking fast toward HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back). Her face is drawn, eyes alert. Camera tracks her. Morning sun. Audio: her footsteps, his quiet: Hey. Cinematic reunion-tense style.

Close-up two-shot of Juanita and Hiro embracing briefly, tightly. Her face buried against his shoulder for one second before she pulls back. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: her: I missed you. Cinematic old-lovers style.
