Medium shot of Juanita stepping back and pushing the black box into Hiro's hands. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: Juanita: Take this. It's a vaccine. For the metavirus. Cinematic handoff style.

Close-up shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s hands holding the small unmarked black box. Camera holds tight on the box. Soft light. Audio: his: How did you. Juanita: Don't ask. Cinematic mystery-gift style.

Medium shot of Juanita speaking rapidly, glancing over her shoulder. Camera holds static on her. Morning light. Audio: Juanita: Rife has been dosing his people for years. Glossolalia control protocol. I worked on the early prototype. I know what the antidote looks like. If you ever get close enough to breathe the air near him, you inject this. In the neck. Cinematic exposition-fast style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face, worried. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: Hiro: How close. Cinematic concern style.
Close-up of Juanita's face, grim and tired. Camera holds tight. Morning light. Audio: Juanita: Closer than you want to be. The Raft. Cinematic reality-check style.

Medium shot of Juanita stepping back toward her car, hand on the door handle. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: her: I'm going in from my side. The Metaverse. You handle meatspace. Cinematic separation-plan style.

Close-up shot of Juanita's face hesitating, hand still on the door. Her eyes meet Hiro's. Camera holds tight on her. Soft light. Audio: Juanita quietly: Be careful, Hiro. I mean it. Cinematic final-glance style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face nodding once, jaw tight. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: his: You too. Cinematic acknowledgment style.

Wide shot of the silver hatchback peeling away, tires squealing on concrete. Hiro watches it go. Camera holds wide. Morning light. Audio: tire squeal, receding engine. Cinematic departure-urgent style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) alone in the aisle, opening the small black box. Inside, nested in black foam, sits a single glass ampoule of pale amber fluid and a slim pneumatic injector. Camera tracks into the box. Sun glint on glass. Audio: the click of the catch. Cinematic gift-revealed style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s hand pressing the box closed, tucking it into an inner pocket of his jumpsuit. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: the zip of the pocket. Cinematic stash style.

Wide shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) ducking back into the storage unit, pulling the roll-up down behind him. Camera holds wide. Morning sun. Audio: the grind of the door closing. Cinematic reset style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) at a crowded workbench inside the unit. Laptop, soldering iron, cables, old hard drives. He powers on the laptop. Camera holds static. Screen-glow. Audio: the fan hum. Cinematic hacker-at-work style.

Close-up of the laptop screen. A video-call window opens labeled VITALY CHERNOBYL - DIALING. Camera holds tight on the screen. Screen light. Audio: a repeating electronic ring. Cinematic outgoing-call style.

Close-up shot of the video call connecting to show VITALY CHERNOBYL (a gaunt Ukrainian man in his 20s with tall egg-white spiked hair, a cold sore on his lip, wearing a ripped black t-shirt and torn black jeans), leaning close to a tiny camera, clearly hungover, pallid, one eye swollen. Behind him a band van interior. Camera holds tight on the feed. Harsh fluorescent light. Audio: Vitaly thickly: Hiro. Is early. What. Cinematic hungover-callee style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) leaning into his own camera. Camera holds tight. Morning light on his face. Audio: Hiro: I need your van. And I need you to play a concert on a boat. Cinematic proposal-crazy style.
Close-up of Vitaly staring, blinking slowly. Camera holds tight. Fluorescent light. Audio: a long beat of silence, then his: Which boat. Cinematic slow-dawning style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) on screen, deadpan. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: Hiro: The Raft. L Bob Rife's flagship. I need a cover to get on board. You play, I do what I need to do. We split after. You want fifty thousand dollars. Cinematic lowball-offer style.

Close-up of Vitaly's pallid face, a slow reckless grin spreading. Camera holds tight. Fluorescent light. Audio: his hoarse laugh, then: Is good. Is good I was going to die anyway. Cinematic reckless-yes style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) giving a single nod. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: his: Meet me at Long Beach in three hours. Cinematic deal-set style.
Close-up of the laptop screen as the call window closes. Camera holds tight. Screen light. Audio: disconnect tone. Cinematic call-ends style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) pulling a pair of sleek Metaverse goggles down over his eyes and settling into a chair at the workbench. Camera holds static. Screen-glow fading to black. Audio: the soft click of the goggles. Cinematic dive-in style.

Wide shot dissolve from the real storage unit to Hiro's Metaverse office - a spare glass-walled room overlooking the Street at night, neon lights streaking far below. Camera holds wide. Virtual neon. Audio: the hum of virtual rendering. Cinematic dive-transition style.

Medium shot of Hiro's avatar - identical to his real body, in a black leather kimono, katana at his waist - seated in a simple chair facing the Librarian. Camera holds static. Soft cloud-light. Audio: faint ambient virtual hum. Cinematic metaverse-study style.

Medium shot of THE LIBRARIAN (a silver-bearded fiftyish man with bright blue eyes, wearing a V-neck sweater over a tweed work shirt and a coarsely woven wool tie) standing patiently hands clasped behind his back. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: silence. Cinematic daemon-awaits style.
Close-up of Hiro's avatar face. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: Hiro: Tell me about Raven. Aleut. Nuclear origin. Assassin. Glass knives. Works for Rife. Cinematic research-query style.

Medium shot of the Librarian nodding, gesturing - a hypercard floats into the air beside him showing a young Aleut man in fatigues. Camera holds static. Cloud light. Audio: Librarian: Dmitri Ravinoff. Aleut Native American. Orphaned age two when the US tested a nuclear weapon at Amchitka in 1972. Cinematic dossier-open style.

Wide shot of a holographic playback - grainy archival footage of the Amchitka nuclear test. A mushroom cloud rises over a grey island landscape. Camera holds static on the playback. Orange flash. Audio: the roar of the detonation. Cinematic archival-history style.

Medium shot of a hypercard floating - black and white photo of a bearded Aleut fisherman on a kayak. Camera holds static on the card. Soft light. Audio: Librarian: His father, an Aleut fisherman, died of thyroid cancer from the fallout. Raven grew up in poverty. Joined the Russian military at sixteen. Cinematic origin-story style.

Wide shot of another holographic playback - Raven on an ice floe, hurling a harpoon into a walrus with terrifying accuracy. Camera holds static. Grey light. Audio: the whip of the harpoon line, a grunt. Cinematic skill-display style.

Medium shot of a hypercard showing Raven in Russian spetsnaz uniform. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: Librarian: Special forces. Expelled after killing three officers with a bayonet. Returned to Alaska. Began freelance assassination work. Cinematic resume-violent style.

Wide shot of a hypercard enlarging to show a sleek silver sidecar on a Harley-Davidson, cross-section diagram. Inside the sidecar sits a small dark cylindrical warhead. Camera tracks in on the diagram. Soft tech light. Audio: Librarian: He carries a one-kiloton nuclear device, acquired from a decommissioned Soviet torpedo, wired to explode if his heart stops. Dead man switch. Cinematic doomsday-warning style.
Close-up of Hiro's avatar face, mouth slightly open. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: his: A walking nuke. Librarian: Precisely sir. Cinematic holy-shit style.

Medium shot of the Librarian picking up a hypercard showing a long tapering obsidian-like knife. Camera tracks in on the blade. Soft light. Audio: Librarian: He favors hand-knapped glass knives. Undetectable by metal scanners. Passed through airport security repeatedly. Cinematic weapon-spec style.

Close-up hypercard of Raven's forehead, the letters POOR IMPULSE CONTROL tattooed in block caps. Camera holds tight on the tattoo. Soft light. Audio: Librarian: A required tattoo, issued by the Federal Restoration Program after his second killing was ruled a crime of passion rather than capital murder. Hiro: Wonderful. Cinematic backstory-grim style.

Medium shot of a hypercard with a photo of L. Bob Rife sketching arrows to another of Raven. Camera holds static on the diagram. Soft light. Audio: Librarian: Rife hired him in the late nineties. Personal assassin. Enforcer. The Raft runs on his violence. Rife keeps him close because no one else dares. Cinematic employer-employee style.

Close-up of Hiro's avatar standing up. Camera tilts up with him. Soft light. Audio: Hiro: Librarian. What does Raven want. Librarian: Revenge, sir. On the United States. For Amchitka. For his father. Cinematic motive-understood style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) in the real storage unit ripping off his goggles, rubbing his eyes. Camera holds static. Dim light. Audio: his heavy exhale. Cinematic reemerge style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) stuffing items into a black tactical duffel: laptop, cables, extra clips for a handgun, the black box with the vaccine. Camera tracks his hands. Dim light. Audio: zips, the clink of metal. Cinematic gear-pack style.

Wide shot outside the storage unit as HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) slings the duffel over his shoulder and mounts his matte-black electric motorcycle. Katana still across his back. Camera holds wide. Sun higher now. Audio: the smartwheels engaging, motor hum. Cinematic hero-rides style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro riding the bike out of the U-Stor-It lot onto the broken street. Camera tracks alongside. Morning sun. Audio: motor whine. Cinematic depart-base style.

Wide aerial tracking shot of the motorcycle weaving through sparse freeway traffic heading north. Refinery flares burn in the distance. Camera tracks from above and behind. Gold-smog light. Audio: motor, wind. Cinematic travel-montage style.

Wide tracking shot of the bike passing enormous oil refineries and container-yards, their steel towers and stacks catching sun. Camera tracks parallel. Gold light. Audio: industrial hum, distant ship horns. Cinematic industrial-landscape style.
Close-up of a faded blue highway sign reading PORT OF LONG BEACH NEXT EXIT. Camera holds tight. Harsh sun. Audio: motor passing, gulls. Cinematic destination-approach style.
Wide tracking shot of the motorcycle leaning into the offramp, dropping toward the port. Camera tracks from above. Gold light. Audio: motor. Cinematic offramp-descent style.

Wide shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) rolling up to a heavy steel gate set in a chainlink fence, a small guard booth to one side. An industrial-looking white semitrailer firetruck sits just inside the fence. Camera holds wide. Hot light. Audio: motor powering down, gulls. Cinematic arrival-port style.

Wide shot of the firetruck - a modified white truck with an enormous arrayed bank of antennas, satellite dishes, a hundred small camera apertures. A door in the side hisses open and a mechanical ramp extends. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: the hiss of hydraulics, the whirr of servos. Cinematic custom-vehicle-reveal style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) walking up the ramp into the dimness of the truck interior. Camera tracks behind him. Dim interior. Audio: his bootsteps on the ramp, the whirr of something inside. Cinematic enter-tech-sanctum style.

Wide shot of the interior of Ng's truck - a padded cabin the size of a small bedroom, lined with flat-screens displaying tactical data, surveillance feeds, a three-dimensional topographic map of the Pacific. In the center, suspended in a complex exoskeletal cradle, is NG (a Vietnamese man in his 50s supported in a biological life-support harness, his body partially encased in a translucent polymer pouch of amber fluid, his head emerging intact with alert dark eyes and thin black hair), his lower body encased in a translucent amber polymer pouch from which tubing snakes, his face bright with intelligence. Camera slowly pans across the space. Cool blue screen-light. Audio: the hum of cooling, a Vietnamese opera playing softly. Cinematic mobile-command-reveal style.

Close-up shot of Ng's face. He turns his head slightly, smiles with real warmth. A single mechanical arm extends from his cradle to offer a slim hand. Camera holds tight on his face. Soft light. Audio: Ng in a warm smooth voice: Hiroaki Protagonist. A pleasure. I have heard stories. Cinematic character-introduction style.
Medium two-shot of Hiro shaking Ng's surprisingly firm hand. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: Hiro: Ng. Thank you for agreeing. Cinematic formal-greeting style.
Medium shot of Ng gesturing toward a leather armchair opposite his cradle. Camera holds static. Dim interior. Audio: Ng: Please. Tea. Cinematic civilized-meeting style.

Medium shot of a small robotic arm extending from the ceiling, setting a lacquered tea tray with a porcelain pot and two cups on a low table between them. Camera tracks the arm. Soft light. Audio: the whirr of the arm, the clink of porcelain. Cinematic robot-butler style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) sitting in the leather chair, laying his duffel at his feet. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: leather creak. Cinematic settle-in style.

Close-up of the robotic arm pouring tea from the pot into both cups. The amber liquid rises precisely to the same level in each. Camera holds tight on the pouring. Soft light. Audio: the hiss of liquid. Cinematic precision-hospitality style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) lifting his cup, sipping, his eyebrows lifting slightly in appreciation. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: a soft slurp. Cinematic good-tea style.

Medium shot of Ng, his eyes sharp despite the amber haze of his cradle. Camera holds static on him. Soft light. Audio: Ng: Now. The Raft. You wish to board a city of four million pirates, mercenaries, and boat people, where L Bob Rife rules as a god king, and you wish to live. Cinematic harsh-reality style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) nodding once. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: Hiro: Yes. Cinematic simple-yes style.
Close-up of Ng's face breaking into a real laugh. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: his wheezing chuckle. Cinematic tragic-humor style.

Medium shot of Ng sobering, leaning slightly forward in his cradle. Camera holds static. Soft light. Audio: Ng: I have a Mafia pizza franchise ship with legitimate business docking at the Raft outskirts. You and your Ukrainian rocker ride in with the cargo. From there, you are on your own. I provide supplementary hardware. The Reason. Cinematic plan-outline style.
Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back). Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: Hiro: The reason. Cinematic puzzled style.

Wide tracking shot as a panel in the wall of the van slides aside and a mechanical arm rotates out an enormous weapon - a four-barrel depleted-uranium gatling gun cradled in a powered exoskeletal harness. Camera tracks in on it. Harsh light. Audio: the servos whine, Ng: The Reason. 20 millimeter electric gatling. Three thousand rounds per minute. Four thousand rounds in the pack. The name is biblical. Cinematic arsenal-reveal style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face staring at the weapon. Camera holds tight. Harsh reflected light. Audio: his: Jesus Christ. Cinematic holy-weapon style.
Close-up of Ng, faint smile. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: Ng: Not biblical reasoning. Different Reason. Cinematic dry-humor style.

Wide shot of Ng gesturing at the armored harness surrounding the weapon. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: Ng: You will need the frame to carry it. Servo-assisted. We have a training module. One hour. Cinematic gear-allocation style.

Wide tracking shot inside the van as HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) climbs into the exoskeletal harness, boots locking into motorized soles, shoulder cuffs clamping shut, arms settling into servo-driven sleeves. Camera tracks around him. Harsh light. Audio: the clack of clamps, servo whine, Ng coaching off-screen. Cinematic suit-up style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro moving across the van interior with the gatling raised. A holographic target range projects before him. He fires a burst. Camera tracks. Muzzle flash. Audio: a deep rapid BRRRRRTTT, shells spraying, the whine of the spinning barrels. Cinematic weapon-trial style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face inside the exoskeleton, learning to feel the harness. Camera holds tight. Flickering muzzle light. Audio: his controlled breathing, the servo whine. Cinematic calibration style.
Close-up of Ng in his cradle, nodding approval. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: Ng: Acceptable. Cinematic mentor-nod style.

Wide shot outside the gate as a battered black touring van with MELTDOWN spray-painted on the side skids into the lot. Smoke curls from the exhaust. Camera holds wide. Hot light. Audio: the cough of a dying muffler, screeching brakes. Cinematic bandwagon-arrival style.

Wide shot of the van door sliding open. VITALY CHERNOBYL (a gaunt Ukrainian man in his 20s with tall egg-white spiked hair, a cold sore on his lip, wearing a ripped black t-shirt and torn black jeans) tumbles out still clutching a half-eaten burrito, followed by three even more disheveled bandmates. Camera holds wide. Hot light. Audio: Vitaly: We here. Where is boat. Cinematic wrecking-crew-arrive style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) walking out of Ng's van to meet Vitaly on the pavement. Camera tracks him. Hot light. Audio: his: You made it. Vitaly: We made it. Is miracle. Cinematic greeting style.

Wide tracking shot of the bandmates dragging battered amp cases and a drumkit out of the van. One drops a cymbal; it clatters ringingly across the asphalt. Camera pans across. Hot light. Audio: the clatter, grunts, muttered Ukrainian curses. Cinematic loadout style.

Wide shot of Ng's mechanical cradle rolling smoothly down the van ramp, a small set of wheels deploying beneath it. Vitaly stops dead, staring. Camera holds wide. Hot light. Audio: the whirr of Ng's mobility unit. Cinematic cradle-on-wheels style.
Close-up of Vitaly's pallid face staring openly at Ng, cold sore prominent. Camera holds tight. Hot light. Audio: his: What the fuck. Cinematic first-impression style.

Medium shot of Ng rolling up to face Vitaly, a polite smile on his face. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: Ng pleasantly: Mister Chernobyl. I am your transportation. Cinematic cordial-weirdness style.
Close-up of Vitaly hugging his burrito protectively. Camera holds tight. Hot light. Audio: his: Okay. Okay is fine. Cinematic nervous-acceptance style.

Wide aerial shot of the port dock. A modest white cargo ship with NOVA SICILIA PIZZA painted on the hull is moored at the end of the pier. Crew load pallets of frozen pizza aboard with a small crane. Camera pans down toward it. Hot light. Audio: the clank of the crane, gulls, waves. Cinematic ship-reveal style.

Close-up of the hull lettering NOVA SICILIA PIZZA in a bold red-and-white stripe. Beneath in smaller text: DELIVERING FAMILY VALUES WORLDWIDE. Camera holds tight. Hot light. Audio: waves on the hull. Cinematic brand-reveal style.

Medium shot of the ship's captain - a stocky Italian man in his 50s, captain's cap pulled low, small wooden cross around his neck - watching the dock from the bridge wing. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: his low: Fucking late. Cinematic skipper-impatient style.

Wide tracking shot of Ng's cradle rolling down the pier toward the ship, Hiro walking alongside, the band trailing with their gear. Camera tracks. Hot light. Audio: wheels on wood, laughter, clatter. Cinematic caravan style.

Wide shot of the crane lowering the gatling gun's hard case, The Reason, into the open hold of the ship among pallets of frozen pizza. Camera holds wide. Hot light. Audio: the clank of the crane, the thud of the case landing. Cinematic weapon-stowed style.

Wide shot of the crane lifting a huge Marshall stack amp onto the deck. Vitaly watches protectively. Camera holds wide. Hot light. Audio: crane whirr, Vitaly shouting: Careful. Cinematic band-loadout style.

Medium two-shot of the captain descending the gangway to meet Hiro on the dock. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: Captain: You Hiro. I'm Tony. Enzo says make this work. So we make this work. Hiro: Thank you. Cinematic professional-handoff style.
Medium shot of the captain looking past Hiro at the chaotic band stumbling aboard. Camera holds static. Hot light. Audio: the captain quietly: Madonna. Cinematic disbelief style.
Wide shot of Hiro, Vitaly's band, and Ng's cradle all aboard, deckhands casting off lines. Camera holds wide. Hot light. Audio: the horn of the ship, rope splash. Cinematic depart-preamble style.
Close-up shot of the ship's horn, a big chrome funnel. Camera holds tight. Hot light. Audio: a deep low horn blast that rattles teeth. Cinematic announcement style.
Wide aerial shot of the ship easing back from the pier, propellers churning the green harbor water. Camera tracks from above. Hot light. Audio: propellers, gull cries. Cinematic departure style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back) at the rail on the stern deck, watching the Long Beach skyline recede. His katana silhouetted against the sun. Camera holds static. Gold light. Audio: wind, engine hum. Cinematic hero-departs style.
Medium two-shot of Vitaly stepping up beside Hiro at the rail, lighting a crumpled cigarette. Camera holds static. Gold light. Audio: the click of his lighter. Cinematic companion style.
Close-up of Vitaly's gaunt face, trying for bravado. Camera holds tight. Gold light. Audio: Vitaly: So. Pirates. Nuclear boyfriend. Raft. What could go wrong. Cinematic gallows-humor style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin, spiky dreadlocks, and a katana across his back)'s face, the shadow of a grin. Camera holds tight. Gold light. Audio: Hiro: Everything, probably. Vitaly: Yes. Is authentic. Cinematic kindred-souls style.

Wide aerial shot pulling up and back from the Nova Sicilia ship heading west into a blazing Pacific sunset, Long Beach shrinking behind. Camera pulls up until the ship is a small white shape. Red-gold. Audio: a synth-orchestral swell. Cinematic act-transition style.

Close-up shot under a blue plastic tarp on the deck of the yacht KOWLOON. YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard) squints through a rip in the canvas, daylight stinging her eyes. Camera holds tight. Dim blue light under the tarp. Audio: the slap of waves on the hull, the drone of the yacht engines. Cinematic captive-dawn style.

Close-up shot of YT's gloved fingers lifting the tarp edge. Through the gap she sees open ocean, a helicopter resting on a landing pad on the upper deck, two Rife Industries security in black tactical gear sipping coffee at the rail. Camera tracks her line of sight. Morning light. Audio: their muted laughter, wave-slap. Cinematic covert-peek style.
Close-up of YT's face, the visor half-raised. Her jaw works as she thinks. Camera holds tight. Dim blue light. Audio: her faint: Okay okay okay. Cinematic teen-strategizing style.

Medium shot of YT under the tarp quietly inventorying her pockets - pooner, dentata in its pouch, phone, a small folding knife, a protein bar. Camera tracks her hands. Dim blue light. Audio: the soft clink of gear, her breathing. Cinematic inventory style.
Close-up of YT unwrapping the protein bar silently, taking a large tired bite. Camera holds tight. Dim light. Audio: soft crunching. Cinematic captive-snack style.

Wide shot from under the tarp, showing boots passing across deck six feet away. Two pairs of black tactical boots pause. Camera holds wide from low angle. Harsh light above tarp. Audio: distorted bass-voice: Check the starboard covers again at fifteen hundred. Other: Copy. Cinematic near-miss style.
Close-up of YT's face frozen under the tarp, eyes wide. Camera holds tight. Dim light. Audio: her suspended breath. Cinematic tension style.
Wide shot from low angle as the boots walk on out of frame. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: receding footsteps. Cinematic relief-beat style.

Wide aerial tracking shot of the small white cargo ship NOVA SICILIA PIZZA steaming west across a blue ocean, white wake streaming behind. Camera tracks from above. Midday sun. Audio: engine drone, wave-hiss. Cinematic ocean-crossing style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) standing beside the Italian captain on the enclosed ship's bridge, watching a radar screen. Camera holds static. Cool screen light on faces. Audio: the soft ping of radar, engine drone. Cinematic command-bridge style.

Close-up of a green radar display. The captain's finger taps a massive ragged return filling most of the screen. Camera holds tight on the screen. Green glow. Audio: Captain: Raft. Ten miles. Smell it before you see it. Cinematic radar-detection style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) stepping out of the bridge onto the deck, pulling on wraparound shades against the blaze of sun. Camera tracks behind. Harsh light. Audio: wind roar. Cinematic out-into-sunlight style.
Close-up of Hiro's nose wrinkling. Camera holds tight on his face. Harsh light. Audio: a distant compound odor slowly rising - fish, smoke, rot, human. Cinematic smell-warning style.

Wide shot from the deck. On the horizon a vast dark smudge stretches from north to south, low and ragged. Camera holds wide at rail height. Haze. Audio: the distant low throb of countless engines and generators. Cinematic first-glimpse-monster style.

Medium two-shot of VITALY CHERNOBYL (the gaunt Ukrainian man in his 20s with tall egg-white spiked hair, cold sore, ripped black t-shirt) joining Hiro at the rail, mouth open. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: Vitaly: Bozhe moi. Cinematic awe-dread style.

Wide tracking shot as the ship closes the distance. The smudge resolves into an enormous chaotic mass of lashed-together vessels of every conceivable size stretching further than the eye can follow, a city the size of San Francisco floating on the ocean. Camera holds wide. Midday haze. Audio: the throb swelling, distant shouts, strange music. Cinematic city-reveal style.

Wide shot of the center of the floating mass, where towers above all else the massive rusted outline of a retired aircraft carrier - the ENTERPRISE, CVN-65, its gray flanks streaked with orange rust, its flight deck covered in haphazard structures and satellite dishes. Camera holds wide. Haze. Audio: a deep thrum radiating from the carrier. Cinematic flagship-reveal style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) raising a small pair of folding binoculars to his eyes, scanning the Enterprise. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: the tiny whirr of the binocs focusing. Cinematic recon style.

Circular binocular POV shot, magnified and slightly wobbling, of the Enterprise flight deck. Armed guards patrol among helicopters. Massive satellite dishes and radio antennas cluster. A large white geodesic dome sits at the center. Camera holds tight. Sharp magnified light. Audio: the soft whirr of zoom. Cinematic surveillance-scan style.

Binocular POV close-up of a group of men walking across the flight deck - they wear business suits instead of uniforms, but each carries a slung submachine gun. Camera holds tight, wobbling. Harsh magnified light. Audio: wind. Cinematic executive-guards style.
Medium shot of Hiro lowering the binoculars, expression grim. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: his: There's our man. Cinematic target-sighted style.

Wide shot of a dozen battered motor launches, outrigger canoes, and jet-skis swarming out from the edge of the Raft toward the Nova Sicilia ship. Each is crammed with ragged armed men shouting and waving. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: a rising chorus of outboard engines, whoops, the crackle of small-arms fire into the air. Cinematic horde-approach style.

Wide tracking shot across the approaching boats. The men are filthy, half-dressed, a mix of every ethnicity with skin damaged by sun and malnutrition. Some carry AK-47s, some carry machetes, some carry only harpoons. Camera pans across them. Harsh light. Audio: their shouts in a dozen languages. Cinematic pirate-horde style.

Close-up of the captain on the bridge yanking the air horn lanyard three times - long, short, long. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: three deep horn blasts echoing across the water. Cinematic signal-whistle style.

Wide shot of the lead pirate boat - a weathered launch flying a black pirate flag with a silhouette of Uncle Enzo in profile - matching the horn signal with three short whistle bursts from the helmsman. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: shrill whistle bursts. Cinematic recognition-signal style.

Close-up of the tattered black pirate flag with the cameo silhouette of Uncle Enzo in profile and the legend MAFIA MARINE in gothic lettering. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: flag-snap in wind. Cinematic flag-reveal style.

Medium two-shot of Hiro and Vitaly watching the pirate boats. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: Hiro: Mafia-aligned pirates. They're our escort through the approaches. Vitaly: Friendly pirates. Is novel. Cinematic exposition-quick style.

Wide shot of the lead launch pulling alongside the Nova Sicilia ship. A wiry middle-aged pirate captain in a ragged Armani suit and a LAPD cap raises a hand in salute toward the bridge. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: engines idling, shouts. Cinematic escort-join style.

Medium shot of the pirate captain - thin black mustache, gold-capped teeth, smart-eyed - saluting up toward the bridge. Camera holds static from the ship side. Harsh light. Audio: Pirate Captain: Cugino. Welcome home. Cinematic mafia-pirate-greeting style.

Wide tracking shot as the Nova Sicilia ship enters the outskirts of the Raft - first a scatter of sampans, junks, and rotting fishing boats lashed together with cable and plank. On the decks, refugees stare up at the passing ship with flat empty eyes. Camera tracks alongside at deck height. Harsh light. Audio: the slap of small waves between hulls, children crying in a dozen languages. Cinematic refugee-fringe style.

Close-up of three small children - emaciated, grimy, different ethnicities - pressed against the rail of a junk, watching the ship pass with wordless curiosity. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: soft wind, a mother's voice calling them away. Cinematic humanitarian-gaze style.

Wide aerial shot of the Raft's periphery - thousands of boats physically tied together with steel cable, rope, chain, and welded plate, forming a continuous shifting platform that heaves gently with the swells. Camera pans across from high altitude. Hazy light. Audio: the creak of ten thousand hulls grinding against each other. Cinematic organism-city style.

Wide shot of countless small smoke plumes rising from cooking fires on the lashed-together decks, hazing the air. Camera holds wide. Hazy orange light. Audio: the crackle of fires, indistinct shouting. Cinematic industrial-squalor style.

Wide tracking shot along the Raft edge as the ship passes a ragged floating market - piles of gutted fish, bundles of dried kelp, scavenged plastic goods, gasoline in gallon jugs. Shawled women haggle with bare-chested men. Camera tracks. Harsh light. Audio: a cacophony of haggling in Chinese, Tagalog, Russian, Spanish. Cinematic marketplace style.

Wide tracking shot of a pack of barefoot children sprinting along a bowed plank walkway between hulls, leaping across gaps with practiced ease. Camera tracks parallel. Harsh light. Audio: their laughter, bare feet slapping wood. Cinematic raft-kids style.

Wide shot of a larger converted factory ship to port, its deck streaming with red water as workers process tuna by hand with long curved knives. Blood slicks run off into the sea, surrounded by circling gulls. Camera pans across. Harsh light. Audio: the rhythmic whack of cleavers, gull shrieks. Cinematic gore-industry style.

Wide shot of three of the Mafia escort boats running ahead of the Nova Sicilia ship, clearing a path through the lashed-together outer ring by simply bumping smaller boats aside. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: hull-on-hull thuds, outboards. Cinematic icebreaker-through-boats style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) at the rail, expression unreadable, processing the scale. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: the engine drone, distant crowd noise. Cinematic protagonist-observes style.

Close-up of VITALY CHERNOBYL (the gaunt Ukrainian man in his 20s with tall egg-white spiked hair, cold sore, ripped black t-shirt)'s face, gone faintly green, hand pressed over his mouth. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: a muffled gag. Cinematic seasick-overload style.

Wide tracking shot of NG (the Vietnamese man in his 50s in the translucent amber life-support pouch, rolling on a wheeled cradle)'s cradle rolling on its wheels down the deck to the rail beside Hiro. Camera tracks. Harsh light. Audio: servo-whirr. Cinematic tech-joins style.

Medium two-shot of Ng and Hiro at the rail. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: Ng: The inner ring is Rife's core. Concentric circles of loyalty radiating outward. The outer ring are refugees, will-less, fed a steady diet of religious broadcast and rice. They are his army. Cinematic tactical-briefing style.

Wide tracking shot past a dense cluster of junks where every inhabitant sits motionless on deck wearing headphones or staring at small portable TVs, antennas raised to the sky like a forest. Camera tracks. Harsh light. Audio: a dull murmur of synchronized broadcast voices bleeding together. Cinematic broadcast-zombies style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) watching the broadcast-receiving refugees, his expression hardening. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: the eerie unison murmur. Cinematic realization style.

Close-up two-shot of Hiro and Ng. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: Ng: Rife broadcasts the glossolalia stream. Ancient Sumerian through modern radio. Their brains are clay for his nam-shub. They will do whatever he says. Cinematic horror-explained style.
Close-up of Hiro's jaw visibly clenching. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: a low wind. Cinematic resolve-solidifies style.

Wide aerial shot of a circular gap in the Raft mass - a clear water zone between the refugee ring and the inner core, patrolled by armed gunboats. Camera pans from high altitude. Harsh light. Audio: patrol engines, a distant siren. Cinematic checkpoint-zone style.

Wide shot of a sleek gray Rife Industries gunboat racing across the clear water toward the Nova Sicilia ship, a manned machine-gun mount on its bow. Camera tracks it. Harsh light. Audio: the rising snarl of its diesels. Cinematic intercept style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) and Vitaly ducking down the bridge stairs into an interior passageway of the ship before the gunboat gets close enough for visual ID. Camera tracks behind them. Dim interior. Audio: their footsteps. Cinematic go-dark style.

Medium shot of the Italian captain, alone on the bridge now, raising both hands open in greeting as the gunboat pulls alongside. Two Rife agents in dark suits stand on the gunboat deck. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: Captain amiably: Afternoon gentlemen. Regular run. Cinematic cover-story style.

Medium shot of the lead Rife agent - a tall East European man with a scar - holding up a tablet. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: Agent in heavy accent: Manifest. Captain: Frozen dough. Tomato product. Three hundred wheels of parmesan. Cinematic paperwork-bluff style.
Close-up of the agent's finger scrolling the tablet. His scar pulses slightly as he squints. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: a soft electronic chirp. Cinematic inspection style.

Medium shot of the agent looking up, hand flicking in a small wave of permission. Camera holds static. Harsh light. Audio: Agent: Dock berth 37. Do not stop. Captain: Ciao. Cinematic clearance-granted style.
Wide shot of the gunboat accelerating away to search the next approaching vessel. Camera pans. Harsh light. Audio: receding engine snarl. Cinematic escort-gone style.

Wide tracking shot as the small Nova Sicilia ship enters the enormous shadow of the USS Enterprise, the gray cliff of the carrier's hull towering hundreds of feet overhead, streaked with rust, barnacled, patched with improvised plating. Camera holds wide. Cool shadow-light. Audio: the shadow muffles sound, amplifies the deep throb of the carrier's generators. Cinematic leviathan-shadow style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) stepping back out onto the deck, head tilted up at the massive hull. Camera holds static. Cool shadow. Audio: the throb. Cinematic awe style.
Medium two-shot of Vitaly stepping up beside Hiro. Camera holds static. Cool shadow. Audio: Vitaly softly: Is cathedral of rust. Cinematic pilgrimage-quote style.

Low-angle tracking shot from the ship deck, looking up along the carrier's superstructure to the top. A huge flag flies there - a red field with a white circle containing a single black cross, the corporate sigil of L Bob Rife's empire. Camera holds low. Shadow-light. Audio: the slow flap of the giant flag. Cinematic flag-of-empire style.

Close-up of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit). Camera holds tight. Cool light. Audio: Hiro quietly: Rife's flag. Vitaly: Is not subtle. Cinematic naming-evil style.

Wide aerial shot of the yacht KOWLOON approaching the Raft from the south, smaller gunboats escorting. Camera pans from above. Harsh light. Audio: propellers, distant Raft murmur. Cinematic parallel-arrival style.

Wide shot of the yacht pulling into a purpose-built dock at the base of the Enterprise, lowered on hydraulic lifts from the carrier's side. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: the hiss of hydraulics, dock clangs. Cinematic vip-arrival style.

Close-up shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with chrome visor-helmet and smartwheel skateboard)'s tarp being lifted off suddenly, harsh daylight flooding in. She blinks, coiled to move. Camera holds tight from her level. Harsh light. Audio: the flap of canvas, boots approaching. Cinematic cover-blown style.

Low-angle shot up at a tall man in a black suit - GLASS EYE MAN (slicked black hair, goatee, one glass eye pointing slightly askew, thin ironic smile) - looking down at YT. Camera holds low. Harsh light. Audio: his amused: Hello little lady. Cinematic captor-reveal style.
Close-up of YT's face, managing a sarcastic smile despite fear. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: her: You missed your parking ticket. Cinematic attitude-forced style.
Close-up of Glass Eye Man's thin smile, the glass eye catching sun strangely. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: his soft laugh. Cinematic villain-smirk style.

Wide shot of two burly guards in dark suits lifting YT bodily off the yacht deck. Her board clatters away across the planks. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: her muffled curse, the clatter. Cinematic captured-carried style.

Wide tracking shot of the guards hauling YT along a hangar deck of the Enterprise. Industrial interior, rusted girders, work lights. Camera tracks with her. Dim yellow light. Audio: bootsteps, her indignant muttering. Cinematic brought-aboard style.

Wide shot of the vast hangar deck interior of the carrier - once a space for dozens of fighter jets, now a warehouse of crates, server racks, mobile buildings, and a red velvet carpet runner rolled across the oily floor. Camera pans across. Dim work-light. Audio: the hum of HVAC, distant generators. Cinematic scale-reveal style.

Wide tracking shot of the guards marching YT along the red carpet toward a central dais where a man stands with his back to them, admiring a holographic display. Camera tracks behind. Dim light. Audio: their bootsteps echoing. Cinematic approach-the-throne style.

Medium shot as the man turns. L BOB RIFE (a stocky Texan media mogul in his 60s with a bushy gray mustache, wearing a western-cut cream suit with a bolo tie and snakeskin boots) smiles warmly, his bushy gray mustache lifting. His brown eyes crinkle with apparently genuine delight. He spreads his hands in welcome. Camera holds static on him. Warm spot-light. Audio: Rife in a broad Texan drawl: Darlin'. There you are. I was just fixing to send the boys out after you. Cinematic villain-introduction style.
Close-up of YT's face, taken aback by the warmth. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her: You. Cinematic off-balance style.

Medium shot of Rife striding down from the dais, hand extended. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: his heavy boot-heels on the deck, his: Lawrence Robert Rife. Friends call me Bob. Cinematic gentleman-evil style.
Close-up of YT's face, hands crossed over her chest. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her sullen: Kidnapper. Cinematic teen-resistance style.
Close-up of Rife's face, his mustache lifting in a big laugh. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: his rolling: Ha ha ha. That's fair. That's fair sweetheart. Cinematic amused-evil style.

Medium two-shot of L BOB RIFE (the mustachioed Texan media mogul in the western-cut cream suit) gently laying a huge paw on YT's shoulder. She flinches but doesn't pull away. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Rife: You're my guest. Not my prisoner. There's a difference. Cinematic menacing-hospitality style.

Wide shot of Rife turning and gesturing broadly down the carpeted deck, like a host touring a mansion. Camera holds wide. Warm light. Audio: Rife: Come on. Let me show you around. Cinematic cult-tour-begins style.

Wide tracking shot of YT walking alongside Rife down the long red carpet, guards trailing. Her body language rigid but compliant. Camera tracks them from behind. Warm spot light. Audio: their bootsteps, Rife humming a hymn. Cinematic ominous-escort style.

Wide aerial shot pulling up and out of the Enterprise hangar, through its open side doors, to reveal the whole Raft city sprawling outward, the setting sun igniting the haze blood-red. Camera pulls up high. Red haze. Audio: a low menacing synth drone. Cinematic act-break style.

Wide aerial shot of the Nova Sicilia pizza ship docking at an outer pier of the Raft, crew tossing lines to waiting deckhands on the lashed-together hulls. Camera pans from above. Late afternoon sun. Audio: rope-thuds, shouts in Italian. Cinematic docking style.

Wide shot of the pier - a rickety structure made of welded shipping containers, lit by strings of bare bulbs already glowing against the deepening dusk. A crowd of curious Raft dwellers gathers. Camera holds wide. Amber light. Audio: crowd murmur. Cinematic rough-dock style.

Wide tracking shot of crew unloading pallets of frozen pizza onto the dock with a handtruck. A man in a stained butcher's apron directs the stacking. Camera tracks the work. Amber light. Audio: clatter of pallets, the whine of a handtruck motor. Cinematic cargo-unload style.

Wide shot as the crew next rolls off a battered black touring van labeled MELTDOWN in day-glo spray paint. Kids and teens in the crowd explode in cheers. Camera holds wide. Amber light. Audio: their cheering, someone shouting VITALY. Cinematic rockstar-arrival style.

Wide shot of VITALY CHERNOBYL (the gaunt Ukrainian rocker with tall egg-white spiked hair, cold sore, ripped black t-shirt, carrying a battered electric guitar) clambering up onto the van roof on the dock, arms raised to the crowd, one hand holding up a guitar. Camera holds wide. Amber light. Audio: the crowd erupts. Cinematic performer-moment style.

Medium shot of Vitaly on the van roof, shouting down at the crowd. Camera holds static. Amber light. Audio: Vitaly: CITIZENS OF RAFT. TONIGHT MELTDOWN PLAYS FREE SHOW. RIGHT HERE ON YOUR SHITTY DOCK. FUCK YES. Cinematic rockstar-rallying style.
Wide shot of the Raft crowd packing tighter around the van, fists up. Camera holds wide. Amber light. Audio: a deafening cheer. Cinematic crowd-ignites style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) crouched in the shadow of a container stack near the dock, watching the growing crowd. Camera holds static. Dim light. Audio: crowd roar behind. Cinematic stalker-observer style.

Medium shot of the Italian captain ambling past Hiro with a cigar, not looking directly at him. Camera holds static. Amber light. Audio: Captain murmured: Go. Fifteen minutes start. Cinematic handoff-signal style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) slipping between container stacks into an alleyway of lashed hulls. Camera tracks behind. Deepening dusk. Audio: footsteps on creaking wood. Cinematic infiltration-begin style.

Wide shot of a modified Mafia delivery van already offloaded onto a slightly larger steel-plate platform. The side door is open; NG (the Vietnamese man in the translucent amber life-support pouch, rolling on a wheeled cradle)'s cradle is visible inside, surrounded by glowing screens. Camera holds wide. Dim interior light. Audio: the hum of electronics. Cinematic mobile-command-hidden style.

Medium tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) stepping up into the back of the van, pulling the door shut behind him. Camera tracks with him. Dim screen-light. Audio: the slam of the door. Cinematic insertion-ready style.

Wide shot of a three-dimensional holographic map of the Raft hovering in the center of the van interior, with glowing markers showing the Enterprise at center and a blinking green dot representing Hiro's current position at the edge. Camera holds wide. Tech-light. Audio: the soft hum of the projector. Cinematic tactical-holo style.

Medium two-shot of Hiro and Ng studying the map. Camera holds static. Blue light. Audio: Ng: Three concentric rings before you reach the Enterprise. Outer slum, middle ring of Russian pirates, inner ring of Rife security. Approximate transit - one kilometer of floating terrain. All hostile. Cinematic mission-brief style.
Close-up of Hiro's face. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: his: Understood. Cinematic ready-up style.

Wide shot inside the van as a pair of hydraulic arms lower the exoskeletal combat harness onto Hiro. He steps into the motorized boot-frames first. The shoulder cuffs clamp shut around him. Helmet lowers. Camera tracks around the suit-up. Mixed light. Audio: servo whine, clamp-clacks. Cinematic power-armor-donning style.

Medium shot as a swing-arm rotates the massive four-barrel 20mm gatling gun into position; Hiro's right arm locks into its cradle, left hand gripping the support. Camera tracks in. Harsh light. Audio: the final CLACK of latches. Cinematic weapon-attached style.

Low-angle tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) standing fully kitted out in the van interior, bulked out by the exoskeleton, the gatling raised across his body. Camera cranes up his length. Harsh light. Audio: his breath through the helmet, the servos humming. Cinematic hero-fully-armed style.
Medium shot of Ng in his cradle looking up at Hiro. Camera holds static. Blue light. Audio: Ng: May the wind be at your back sir. And your enemies in front of it. Cinematic send-off style.

Wide shot of the side door of the van rolling open, revealing dusk-lit Raft alleys and distant amplified music from Vitaly's opening chord. Camera holds wide from inside. Amber-dusk. Audio: the door scraping open, a ragged guitar chord booming across the Raft. Cinematic doors-open style.

Wide shot atop the van roof on the dock. VITALY CHERNOBYL (the gaunt Ukrainian rocker with tall egg-white spiked hair, cold sore, ripped black t-shirt, carrying a battered electric guitar) stands full silhouette against a spotlight, guitar raised. He slams down a single massive power chord. Camera holds wide low. Harsh white spot. Audio: a wall-shaking distorted power chord. Cinematic concert-ignite style.
Wide shot of the Raft crowd exploding with noise, fists and bottles raised. Camera holds wide. Strobe. Audio: a roar. Cinematic mob-energy style.

Wide tracking shot across the van stage as the full band tears into a screaming punk anthem - Vitaly on guitar and screaming vocals, a bassist with a mohawk, a drummer pounding. Camera tracks across. Purple-green strobe. Audio: a blast of distorted thrashcore punk at arena volume. Cinematic punk-onslaught style.

Close-up of Vitaly's gaunt face at the mic, screaming indecipherable Ukrainian lyrics, veins standing out. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: guttural screaming over distortion. Cinematic frontman-close style.

Low-angle wide shot as HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) steps down from the van onto the wooden planks of a narrow Raft alley, the weight of his boots sinking the boards. Camera holds low. Amber light. Audio: the creak of planks under enormous weight. Cinematic first-step-out style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro walking slowly down the alley between lashed hulls, the massive gatling angled low. Camera tracks parallel. Amber light. Audio: the steady heavy thud of his armored steps. Cinematic armored-advance style.

Wide shot of the Raft dwellers in the alley turning to see him, then fleeing silently into the boats on either side. A mother grabs her child and vanishes. Camera holds wide. Amber light. Audio: the whisper of panicked flight. Cinematic clearing-civilians style.

Close-up first-person visor POV showing a HUD overlay marking alleyways in green and red, targets appearing as orange outlines ahead. Camera holds tight. Orange visor-tint. Audio: a soft electronic ping. Cinematic HUD-pov style.

Wide shot - through a gap in the alley, three RUSSIAN PIRATES (tattooed muscle men in salvaged body armor) with AK-47s crouch behind a crate. Camera holds wide. Dim light. Audio: their low Russian chatter. Cinematic enemy-spotted style.

Wide tracking shot as Hiro pivots and kicks a cargo door off its hinges beside him, smashing into the pirates' position unexpectedly from an unexpected angle. Camera tracks the door flying. Dim light. Audio: a thunderous metallic BANG. Cinematic breach style.

Wide shot of the three pirates rotating in slow motion toward the breach, raising their rifles. Camera holds wide in slow motion. Dim light. Audio: their startled shouts slowed. Cinematic slo-mo-reaction style.

Low-angle tracking shot as HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) levels the gatling and squeezes off a three-second burst. The four barrels spin into a blurred disc, spraying muzzle fire that lights the alley like a strobe. Camera tracks the muzzle flash. White-orange light. Audio: a deep ripping BRRRRRRTTTTT that cancels out the concert bass. Cinematic gatling-unleash style.

Wide shot of the crate exploding into splinters and the pirate bodies staggering back and collapsing in a spray. Camera holds wide. Strobing muzzle light. Audio: the tearing continues for three full seconds, then silence. Cinematic carnage-discreet style.

Close-up of brass shell casings spraying from the ejector port of the gatling, clattering onto the planks at Hiro's feet in a pile. Camera holds tight on the pile. Harsh light. Audio: the rain of hot brass on wood. Cinematic brass-cascade style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro stepping over the splintered crate and the dead pirates, continuing down the alley. Camera tracks. Amber light. Audio: his steady heavy steps. Cinematic cold-advance style.

Wide shot of the packed dockside crowd, Vitaly's band mid-song, the music so loud the air itself is a physical force. Camera holds wide. Strobing concert light. Audio: the onslaught of music. Cinematic cover-reestablish style.

Medium shot of NG (the Vietnamese man in the translucent amber life-support pouch, rolling on a wheeled cradle)'s cradle parked next to a small laptop running audio-mixer software. The bars are pegged to deafening levels. Camera holds static. Dim blue light. Audio: the music bleeding through walls. Cinematic sound-as-weapon style.

Wide aerial shot from high above the Raft, looking down at the small glow of the concert at the outer edge, the vast dark Raft stretching between it and the bright center where the Enterprise looms. Camera pans from above. Night. Audio: the muffled concert below. Cinematic geographic-context style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro crossing a makeshift pontoon bridge of lashed plastic drums, water sloshing at his armored feet. A pirate appears at the far end. Camera tracks. Night. Audio: the slosh of water, engine drone. Cinematic crossing-exposed style.

Medium shot of a Russian pirate at the far end of the bridge lifting an RPG-7 to his shoulder, sighting. Camera holds static on him. Dim light. Audio: the click of the trigger preparation. Cinematic RPG-threat style.

Wide tracking shot as HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) cuts loose with a burst. The four-barrel muzzle flash lights the water like lightning. Camera tracks. White light. Audio: BRRRRTTT. Cinematic preemptive-fire style.
Wide shot of the pirate disintegrating into debris, the RPG spinning loose into the water and sinking. Camera holds wide. Water-reflected flash. Audio: a splash. Cinematic enemy-erased style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) stepping off the pontoons onto a more solid section of lashed fishing boats. Camera tracks. Amber light. Audio: planks creak under weight. Cinematic checkpoint-passed style.

Wide shot through a gap between shanties - a dozen pirates set up behind sandbags, one manning a mounted DShK machine gun. Camera holds wide. Work light. Audio: their shouted Russian orders, mag-slap sounds. Cinematic heavy-resistance style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro diving behind a half-rusted shipping container as heavy machine-gun fire tears into the wall where he was. Camera tracks with him. Muzzle flash. Audio: a deep rattling BRRRRPPP of the DShK and ricochets. Cinematic cover-dive style.

Close-up of heavy slugs slamming into the container inches from Hiro's helmet, sparks showering. Camera holds tight. Strobing sparks. Audio: deafening ringing impacts. Cinematic suppression-fire style.
Close-up POV through Hiro's visor, the HUD outlining the DShK position in orange. Camera holds tight. Orange tint. Audio: muted firing. Cinematic target-lock style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro stepping out around the container and lighting up the DShK position with a sustained 5-second burst. Muzzle flashes light the entire alley in strobing orange. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: a long sustained BRRRRRRRRRTTTTT, screams, wood splinters, a propane tank igniting. Cinematic sustained-massacre style.

Wide shot of a propane tank igniting in a big orange fireball, consuming the pirate position. Camera holds wide. Blinding orange. Audio: the WHUMP of the blast, secondary pops. Cinematic fire-explosion style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro striding forward through drifting black smoke, silhouetted by the fire behind him. Camera tracks in front of him. Orange-black. Audio: the crackle of fire, his steady footsteps. Cinematic apocalyptic-stride style.

Wide shot of the concert at full tilt, Vitaly crowd-surfing, the massive Raft audience utterly caught up. Camera tracks across the crowd. Strobe. Audio: crushing punk music and a crowd roar. Cinematic attention-captured style.

Medium shot of VITALY CHERNOBYL (the gaunt Ukrainian rocker with tall egg-white spiked hair, cold sore, ripped black t-shirt, carrying a battered electric guitar) briefly on his feet on the van roof again, catching a distant flash of orange in the deep Raft. He grins wolfishly and shreds harder. Camera holds static. Strobe. Audio: his guitar tearing up a solo. Cinematic acknowledging-chaos style.

Wide shot of an inner checkpoint - a welded steel gate across a main thoroughfare on the Raft, flanked by two guard towers, four guards with rifles visible. Camera holds wide. Work light. Audio: the crackle of their radios. Cinematic inner-checkpoint style.

Medium shot of a guard on a tower lifting binoculars, seeing a figure walking calmly down the thoroughfare toward them. His mouth falls open. Camera holds static. Work light. Audio: his radio squawk: Contact. Single man. Armed. Heavy. Cinematic spotter-realize style.

Wide shot as all four guards start firing at the approaching Hiro, the tower-mounted heavy weapons joining in. Tracer rounds arc down the thoroughfare. Camera holds wide. Strobing fire. Audio: a continuous wall of small-arms and heavy fire. Cinematic wall-of-lead style.

Close-up tracking shot of the armored exoskeleton's chest plates as bullets whip in and spark away. The armor holds but is visibly gouged. Camera tracks the impacts. Strobing white. Audio: the hammering of impacts, Hiro's groan. Cinematic armor-tested style.

Low-angle wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) bracing his stance and opening up with a sustained 6-second burst, the gatling barrel-cluster spinning into invisibility, muzzle flashes drenching the thoroughfare in daylight. Camera tracks the shot. White-orange. Audio: the sustained buzzsaw BRRRRRRRR. Cinematic counterbattery style.

Wide shot of the two guard towers splintering into matchwood, guards falling, the gate itself cratering and bulging. Camera holds wide. Dust and smoke. Audio: the roar continues, wood splintering, metal collapsing. Cinematic structure-destroyed style.
Wide shot of the gate finally collapsing in a shower of torn steel. Dust billows. Camera holds wide. Dust-orange. Audio: the wrenching groan of metal. Cinematic barrier-breached style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) walking through the ruined gate into the Inner Ring, smoke still swirling around his silhouette. Camera tracks. Dust-hazy. Audio: his heavy steady footsteps, crackling fires. Cinematic victorious-advance style.

Close-up POV through Hiro's visor, a small comm-window opening with Ng's face. Camera holds tight. Blue tint. Audio: Ng: Hiro. Raven is moving. Coming from the inner ring toward you. Cinematic warning-incoming style.
Close-up of Hiro's face inside the helmet. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: Hiro: Good. I'm waiting. Cinematic ready-for-him style.
Close-up insert of Ng. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: Ng sharply: Do not wait. You are not ready for him. Get to the Enterprise. I will buy you time. Cinematic mentor-urgency style.
Close-up of Hiro's face. Camera holds tight. Audio: Hiro tight: Copy. Cinematic comply-grudgingly style.

Wide shot of Hiro pausing in the ruined gate, head turning. In the distance, a deep unmistakable Harley-Davidson rumble rises over the sound of the burning structure. Camera holds wide. Smoke-light. Audio: the growing Harley thunder. Cinematic villain-arrival-by-sound style.
Close-up of Hiro's eyes inside the helmet, narrowing. Camera holds tight. Blue HUD. Audio: the Harley closer. Cinematic realization style.

Wide shot down the thoroughfare. At the far end, crossing a ridge of ramp between sections of the Raft, the HARLEY-DAVIDSON appears - RAVEN (the massive seven-foot Aleut with long black hair, Fu Manchu mustache, and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) astride the chopper, one boot down, a silver sealed sidecar attached to the right side. Headlight pinning Hiro. Camera holds wide. Harsh headlight. Audio: the Harley idle, a deep wet rumble. Cinematic antagonist-entrance style.

Wide static shot of the two men at opposite ends of the ruined thoroughfare, fire and smoke between them. Hiro in armor with gatling; Raven on the bike, sidecar visible. Camera holds wide. Orange-amber. Audio: the Harley idle, distant fires. Cinematic standoff style.
Medium shot of Raven astride the idling bike, unbothered. Camera holds static. Harsh headlight. Audio: his amused: That's a big gun for a little man. Cinematic villain-dismissal style.
Low-angle medium shot of Hiro raising the gatling, barrel-cluster beginning to spin up. Camera holds low. Spotlight. Audio: the spinning whine rising. Cinematic aiming-up style.

Close-up of Raven's gloved hand tapping the sealed silver sidecar beside him casually. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Raven drawled: You fire that, my sweetheart here levels everything inside a mile. Including you. Cinematic nuke-threat style.
Close-up of Hiro's face behind the visor, jaw tightening. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: the gatling whine fading as he ease off. Cinematic tactical-standdown style.
Close-up of Raven's face, the big Fu Manchu mustache lifting, POOR IMPULSE CONTROL tattoo visible. Camera holds tight. Harsh light. Audio: his rumbling laugh. Cinematic triumph-small style.

Close-up of Raven drawing a long tapering obsidian-looking glass knife from a sheath at his thigh. The blade catches the firelight like a prism. Camera holds tight. Orange prism-flash. Audio: the soft hiss of the blade leaving the sheath. Cinematic signature-weapon style.

Wide tracking shot as Raven hurls the glass knife with a whip-crack throw, the blade tumbling end-over-end through the smoke toward Hiro. Camera tracks the blade in slow motion. Strobing firelight. Audio: a high whistling hum. Cinematic weapon-in-flight style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) swinging the gatling up across his body, the glass knife shattering against the spinning barrel-cluster in a crystalline burst. Camera holds static. Strobing sparks. Audio: the shatter, a ringing tone. Cinematic parry-armored style.
Close-up of Raven laughing outright, delighted. Camera holds tight. Orange light. Audio: his deep laugh. Cinematic fun-for-villain style.

Wide tracking shot of Raven gunning the Harley, the sidecar swinging as the bike peels away up a ramp and vanishes between stacks of containers. Camera tracks. Dust. Audio: the Harley roar receding. Cinematic tactical-retreat style.
Medium shot of Hiro lowering the gatling slowly, shoulders easing. Camera holds static. Orange light. Audio: his exhale. Cinematic respite style.
Close-up POV through visor, comm window open. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Hiro: Ng. He let me go. Ng: He is testing you. And gauging. Move. Cinematic mentor-decode style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) breaking into a heavy armored jog up the main thoroughfare. Lights of the Enterprise visible ahead. Camera tracks parallel. Amber-fire light. Audio: his rhythmic heavy footfalls. Cinematic push-forward style.

Wide shot of a squad of Rife security rounding a corner, seeing Hiro, and immediately scattering into alleyways. Camera holds wide. Amber light. Audio: their panicked shouts. Cinematic opfor-demoralized style.
Close-up of Hiro's visored face as he keeps jogging, gatling down but ready. Camera holds tight. Motion blur. Audio: breath, footfalls. Cinematic conserve-ammo style.

Wide shot of the base of the Enterprise - a large steel boarding ramp deployed from the carrier's flank to the Raft mass, currently guarded by two heavy machine-gun nests. Floodlights wash the area. Camera holds wide. Harsh floodlight. Audio: the hum of the carrier's generators, gulls. Cinematic final-objective style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro ducking behind a stack of metal drums, peering at the ramp. Camera tracks with him. Harsh light. Audio: distant gunfire, his breathing. Cinematic final-approach style.

Wide shot of two MG gunners sweeping the approaches with search lights, their floodlight beams crossing and recrossing. Camera holds wide. Beam-strobe. Audio: the whine of the spotlight motors. Cinematic defensive-position style.
Close-up POV through Hiro's visor. Ng's face in comm window. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: Ng: Both sides at once. Spread. I will cue you. Three. Two. One. Mark. Cinematic go-cue style.

Low-angle wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man with cappuccino skin and spiky dreadlocks, now wearing a powered exoskeletal combat harness over his black jumpsuit, holding an enormous 20mm four-barrel gatling gun called THE REASON, katana still slung across his back) rising from cover and opening up with both arms extended, the gatling raking the first gun nest then pivoting to the second in a single sweeping burst. Muzzle flash drenches the whole area. Camera tracks the pivot. White-orange. Audio: a long sweeping BRRRRRRRRRTTTTT. Cinematic double-kill style.

Wide shot of both gun nests shredded into burning debris, the ammo cans cooking off in small secondary pops. Camera holds wide. Orange fire. Audio: the rip of secondary explosions. Cinematic dual-obliteration style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro sprinting up the steel boarding ramp toward the open hangar bay mouth in the carrier's side. Camera tracks from above-behind. Harsh light. Audio: his pounding armored footfalls. Cinematic charge style.

Wide low-angle shot looking up at the vast black rectangle of the hangar bay opening, dwarfing the approaching armored Hiro. Interior industrial light glows inside. Camera holds low. Hangar-light. Audio: the deep throb of the carrier, his footfalls. Cinematic jaws-of-leviathan style.

Wide tracking shot from the hangar interior as Hiro crosses over the threshold into the enormous rust-streaked interior. Camera tracks. Industrial light. Audio: echoing clanging footsteps. Cinematic inside-the-beast style.

Wide shot pulling back to reveal Hiro standing in the cavernous hangar bay of the Enterprise, armored silhouette small against the vast industrial interior, alone. Camera pulls back. Cool industrial light. Audio: a low synth drone swelling, his slow breathing. Cinematic act-transition style.

Wide shot of the cavernous Enterprise hangar deck interior - towering gray girders overhead, industrial work lights, stacks of crates, mobile command buildings in rows. HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous 20mm gatling The Reason, katana still slung on his back) stands alone at the threshold. Camera pulls back. Cool steel light. Audio: the deep background hum of the carrier, his footfalls echoing. Cinematic interior-vast style.

Wide tracking shot past the rows of sheet-metal mobile buildings installed on the hangar floor, each one housing some Rife Industries department, labeled in plastic letters. Camera tracks. Yellow work-light. Audio: muffled office sounds from inside each, typewriters, voices. Cinematic ship-as-office style.

Wide shot of HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous 20mm gatling The Reason, katana still slung on his back) ducking behind a stack of steel shipping crates as a pair of Rife security round a corner on patrol. Camera holds wide. Dim pockets of shadow. Audio: the patrol's boots on the deck. Cinematic stealth-armored style.

Close-up POV through visor, the HUD showing a map of the Enterprise interior with a glowing red dot labeled RIFE OFFICE - L4 and a second dot flashing ENVELOPE ASSET. Camera holds tight. Orange tint. Audio: a soft map-ping. Cinematic navigate-by-hud style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro slipping sideways between crate-stacks, the gatling held low. Camera tracks. Dim light. Audio: his careful steps. Cinematic lateral-movement style.

Wide shot of a surprisingly ornate room deep inside the carrier - Oriental rugs, leather armchairs, a small wet bar, a massive oak desk, bookshelves of rare bibles, all dimly lit by Tiffany lamps. Camera pans across. Warm amber lamp-light. Audio: classical music playing softly from hidden speakers. Cinematic villain-study-reveal style.

Medium shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with chrome visor-helmet) sitting upright on an enormous leather couch, still in her kourier coverall, arms crossed defensively. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the distant music, her shallow breathing. Cinematic captive-in-comfort style.

Wide shot of L BOB RIFE (the stocky Texan media mogul in his 60s with a bushy gray mustache, in a western-cut cream suit) standing at the wet bar, pouring two glasses of fresh orange juice. Camera holds wide. Warm light. Audio: the soft splash of juice, a hummed hymn. Cinematic domestic-menace style.

Medium tracking shot of Rife crossing the rug with the two glasses, setting one in YT's hand before she can refuse. Camera tracks. Warm light. Audio: Rife: Drink up darlin'. Long trip. Cinematic forced-hospitality style.
Close-up of YT holding the glass, looking at the orange juice suspiciously. Camera holds tight. Lamp-light. Audio: her wary silence. Cinematic drug-suspect style.

Medium shot of Rife raising his own glass toward YT and taking a deep swig. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Rife after swallowing: Fresh squeezed. Florida trees. Raft's got to import every little thing. Cinematic disarming-performance style.
Close-up of YT reluctantly taking a tiny sip. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the soft swallow. Cinematic reluctant-cooperation style.
Close-up of YT's face a beat later, her pupils dilating slightly, her jaw relaxing. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her small confused: Oh. Cinematic drug-takes-effect style.

Close-up of Rife's face leaning close, his gray mustache lifting warmly. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Rife: There you go. Just a little something to take the edge off your day. Cinematic paternal-predator style.
Close-up of YT's face, trying to keep her eyes focused. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her slurred: You drugged me. Cinematic losing-battle style.
Medium two-shot of Rife settling into the armchair opposite the couch, hands folded on his belly. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the creak of leather. Cinematic audience-with-devil style.

Medium shot of Rife settled comfortably, eyes bright. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Rife: You want to know what this is all about little lady. I'll tell you. Because you're family now. In a way. Cinematic villain-speech style.
Close-up of YT swaying slightly, her head tilting. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her faint: family. Cinematic fogged style.

Wide shot of Rife rising, gesturing expansively around the rich office. Camera holds wide. Warm light. Audio: Rife: I own the fiber-optic backbone of the world. Every pixel you have ever seen on a screen, you have paid me a piece for. Cinematic monologue-theatrical style.

Medium shot of Rife crossing to his shelf of rare bibles, pulling down an ancient leather-bound volume. Camera holds static. Lamp-light. Audio: Rife: And I own something older. The first language. The mother tongue. The rosetta stone of the soul. Cinematic artifact-time style.

Close-up of Rife opening a tooled leather-bound bible to a pressed clay tablet inside. Cuneiform. Camera holds tight on the tablet. Lamp-light. Audio: the creak of old leather. Cinematic relic-revealed style.
Close-up of YT staring at the tablet, not really seeing it. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her dull: Huh. Cinematic sedated-victim style.

Medium shot of Rife's face close to hers, now animated. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Rife: The nam-shub. The programming language for human beings. Whisper the right syllables in the right order and a man does what you tell him. My daddy knew it, darlin'. Oil-town preacher. Now I know it. Cinematic manic-revelation style.
Close-up of YT leaning away slightly. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her: Weird. Cinematic drugged-unimpressed style.
Close-up of Rife chuckling. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: his: You're a delight. Cinematic amused-villain style.

Close-up two-shot of Rife's face inches from YT's. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Rife softly: You're going to help me deliver the next phase. We're going to broadcast the nam-shub over every screen on earth at once. Cinematic doomsday-plan style.
Close-up of YT's face, her eyes momentarily sharpening. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her: That's. Cinematic almost-present style.
Medium shot of Rife returning to his armchair, satisfied. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: his sigh of contentment. Cinematic self-satisfied style.

Wide shot of YT's head lolling to one side. Behind Rife's armchair, partially obscured by a silk screen, is an ornate refrigerated doghouse with a glowing amber interior. Camera tracks her line of sight. Warm + cold-blue light mix. Audio: a faint refrigerated hum. Cinematic strange-detail style.

Close-up of the doghouse interior - a huge scaled-up pit-bull-like shape visible inside, FIDO (a Rat Thing - a large cybernetic half-organic creature resembling a scaled-up pit bull fused with titanium alloy exoskeletal prosthetics, glowing amber eyes, barely visible under layered thermal armor panels, tethered in a refrigerated doghouse) partially glimpsed, thermal plating catching dim light, single amber eye glinting. Camera holds tight on the eye. Cold blue-amber. Audio: a low mechanical breathing. Cinematic rat-thing-reveal style.
Close-up of YT's face, sudden recognition breaking through the haze. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her soft: Fido. Cinematic recognition-through-drug style.

Close-up of the rat thing's amber eye inside the doghouse, tracking deliberately toward YT's voice. A low recognition rumble. Camera holds tight on the eye. Amber glow. Audio: a deep rumble. Cinematic beast-recognizes style.
Medium shot of Rife oblivious, sipping his juice. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the faint hum of the doghouse. Cinematic blind-spot style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous 20mm gatling The Reason, katana still slung on his back) moving down a narrow metal service corridor, the gatling held low.
