Exposed pipes and cables line the walls. Camera tracks. Harsh fluorescent. Audio: his heavy footfalls, the ship's thrum. Cinematic infiltration-interior style.
Close-up POV through his visor, the HUD redrawing deck plans. Red dot marker close now. Camera holds tight. Orange tint. Audio: soft ping. Cinematic navigation style.
Medium shot of Hiro stopping at a sealed blast door labeled L4 - EXECUTIVE SECURE. Camera holds static. Fluorescent. Audio: the far ship thrum. Cinematic destination-reached style.
Close-up of Hiro swinging the massive gatling down into its harness rest, freeing his hands. Camera holds tight. Fluorescent. Audio: servo-thunk of the gun locking. Cinematic switch-weapons style.

Close-up of Hiro reaching up over his shoulder and drawing the katana. The blade hisses out - polished mirror-bright, twenty-six inches of monomolecular steel. Camera holds tight on the draw. Fluorescent glint. Audio: the long hiss of steel. Cinematic blade-unsheathed style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro making three precise slashing cuts across the blast door's hinges. The monomolecular edge passes through steel as if through butter. Camera tracks the cuts. Sparks. Audio: three sharp metallic whines, sparks, the door sagging. Cinematic blade-vs-steel style.
Wide shot of the blast door toppling inward with a deafening crash. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: the BOOM of steel hitting deck. Cinematic breach style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) stepping over the fallen door into an archive room beyond - climate-controlled, glass display cases of ancient artifacts. Camera tracks. Cool blue-white light. Audio: the hum of climate control. Cinematic archive-entrance style.

Wide tracking shot past the cases - clay tablets, small statues of Asherah, a gold cult medallion, stone cylinder seals. At the far end, on a velvet pedestal, a single clay envelope glows under a spotlight. Camera tracks to it. Cool blue. Audio: climate hum. Cinematic relic-hunter style.

Medium shot of Hiro stopping before the pedestal. The clay envelope is rectangular, the size of a cigarette pack, covered in dense cuneiform. Camera holds static. Spotlight. Audio: his quiet breath. Cinematic artifact-at-last style.

Close-up of Hiro's gloved hand reaching into the case through a gap. He lifts the envelope with great care. Camera holds tight. Spotlight. Audio: the faintest click of the pedestal. Cinematic theft-careful style.
Close-up of a tiny red LED on the pedestal flicking on as Hiro lifts the envelope. Camera holds tight. Red LED. Audio: a soft chime. Cinematic alarm-tripped style.
Close-up of Hiro's face behind the visor. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: Hiro: Ah shit. Cinematic cursing-softly style.
Close-up of Hiro tucking the clay envelope into a padded pouch on the exoskeleton's chest, sealing it. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: the zip. Cinematic secured style.

Wide shot through the doorway down the corridor as red alarm strobes begin lighting the walls and a siren starts. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: a rising klaxon WOOP WOOP WOOP. Cinematic alert-triggered style.
Wide shot of Hiro turning back, swapping katana back to sheath on his shoulder and hefting the gatling again. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: servo movement. Cinematic switch-back style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro pushing back out through the ruined doorway into the red-strobed corridor. Camera tracks behind. Red strobe. Audio: klaxon, footfalls. Cinematic exfil-begins style.

Wide shot of Rife standing over YT on the couch, now unbuttoning his western suit jacket as he looks down at her with paternal greed. Camera holds wide. Warm light tinged with danger. Audio: the slow unsheathing of buttons. Cinematic predator-moment style.
Close-up of YT's face, the drug wearing just enough for fear and fury to punch through. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her faint: Oh fuck no. Cinematic clarity-returning style.

Close-up of YT's fingers fumbling at a small pouch on her utility belt, tucked under her coverall's waistband. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the soft clink of metal. Cinematic weapon-reach style.

Close-up of YT's palm revealing the DENTATA - a small plastic-and-steel device like a flattened dental retainer with tiny sharp curved prongs inside. Camera holds tight on the object. Warm light. Audio: her soft slurred: Ha. Cinematic chekhov's-dentata style.

Medium two-shot of Rife kneeling beside the couch, large palm extending to brush YT's hair back. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Rife: Don't you fret darlin'. Cinematic assault-imminent style.

Close-up of YT raising the dentata to her mouth, pretending a yawn, slipping the device inside herself with a practiced motion. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her faint: Okay Uncle Bob. Cinematic trap-primed style.
Medium shot of Rife beginning to press closer. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: his heavy breathing. Cinematic moment-of-horror style.
Wide shot of the office as a KLAXON begins WOOPING through a speaker in the ceiling, red emergency light strobing. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: the klaxon. Cinematic saved-by-alarm style.
Close-up of Rife freezing, head swiveling. His palm leaves YT. Camera holds tight. Red strobe. Audio: the klaxon continuing. Cinematic interrupted style.
Close-up of Rife's face darkening, mustache twitching. Camera holds tight. Red strobe. Audio: Rife: What in hell. Cinematic villain-annoyed style.
Wide shot of Rife striding to the oak desk, slapping an intercom. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: Rife: Status. Cinematic seek-intel style.

Close-up of the intercom speaker. Camera holds tight. Red flicker. Audio: a panicked Rife security voice: Intruder on level four sir. Heavily armed. The relic vault. Rife: SEND RAVEN. Cinematic crisis-response style.
Close-up of YT's face, still feigning drugged but eyes now sharp. Camera holds tight. Red strobe. Audio: Rife: Raven, ON IT. Cinematic opportunity-spotted style.
Medium shot of Rife striding back to YT, now all business. Camera holds static. Red strobe. Audio: Rife: Little lady, we'll have to reschedule our little chat. Stay put. Cinematic sidelined style.

Wide tracking shot of Rife sweeping out of the quarters, two suited guards flanking him. The door seals with a hydraulic hiss. Camera tracks. Red strobe. Audio: the hiss of the door. Cinematic villain-exits style.

Wide shot of YT alone on the couch, klaxon strobing. She sits very still for a beat, then sits up sharply. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: her exhale, the klaxon. Cinematic opportunity-sized style.
Wide tracking shot of YT springing off the couch, head clear despite the residue of whatever was in the juice. Camera tracks her. Red strobe. Audio: her boot-thuds. Cinematic fully-awake style.
Close-up of YT spitting the dentata into her palm, tucking it carefully back into the pouch. Camera holds tight. Red strobe. Audio: her: Not this time asshole. Cinematic defused style.
Wide shot of YT at the hydraulic door, kicking it tentatively. It doesn't budge. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: the dull thud of her boot. Cinematic obstacle-first style.
Medium shot of YT pivoting, eyes going to the doghouse behind the silk screen. Camera holds static. Red strobe + amber glow. Audio: the low rumble from inside. Cinematic idea-dawns style.

Wide tracking shot of YT crossing slowly toward the doghouse, hands raised in a calming gesture. Camera tracks. Mixed light. Audio: her soft: Hey buddy. Hey Fido. Remember me. Cinematic dog-approach style.

Close-up of the rat thing's amber eye inside the doghouse brightening, a wet nose emerging into view - a massive thing, metal-and-flesh. Camera holds tight. Amber glow. Audio: a deep sniff, a puppyish whine. Cinematic beast-recognizes style.

Close-up of the refrigerated doghouse interior. Fido's huge face pressed up against the glass, titanium-rimmed jaws panting, tongue lolling. Camera holds tight. Amber. Audio: a whimpering whine. Cinematic loyal-creature style.

Medium shot of YT crouched at the glass of the doghouse, hand pressed against it. Camera holds static. Amber light on her face. Audio: her: I need you to be quiet. I need you to help me. Cinematic confidante-monster style.
Close-up of YT's fingers finding a small unmarked mechanical latch below the glass. She pulls it. Camera holds tight. Amber. Audio: the soft click. Cinematic release style.

Wide shot of the doghouse glass swinging out. Fido steps carefully out - a shape the size of a small pony, titanium-clad pit-bull morphology, his back and flanks bristling with heat-dissipation fins that begin venting white vapor as he leaves the cold. Camera holds wide. Vapor and amber eye-glow. Audio: a whoosh of cold steam, his heavy padding steps. Cinematic monster-uncaged style.

Medium shot of YT throwing her arms around the massive thing's neck, not quite able to reach all the way around. Camera holds static. Amber-warm. Audio: her soft: Good boy. Cinematic beast-and-girl style.
Close-up of Fido's huge head resting briefly against YT's shoulder, a soft metallic purr. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the low purr. Cinematic gentle-monster style.

Medium shot of YT pulling back, looking into Fido's amber eyes seriously. Camera holds static. Amber light. Audio: her: I need to get out. And I think I know somebody needs you. Cinematic mission-brief style.
Close-up of Fido's mouth, the titanium jaws rumbling. Camera holds tight. Amber. Audio: a low rolling growl of agreement. Cinematic beast-agreeing style.

Wide shot of YT standing in the center of the dim ornate office, the massive glowing-eyed Fido at her side. The door is still sealed. Red emergency strobe. Camera holds wide. Strobe + amber. Audio: the klaxon continuing, Fido's low breath. Cinematic duo-ready style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous 20mm gatling The Reason, katana on his back) running down a red-strobed service corridor, massive armored footfalls clanging on steel decking. Pipes hiss overhead. Camera tracks parallel. Red strobe. Audio: his heavy running, the klaxon, hiss of steam. Cinematic urgent-flight style.
Wide shot as four Rife security with submachine guns round a corner ahead of Hiro, raising their weapons. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: their shouts: HALT HALT. Cinematic ambush style.

Low-angle tracking shot of HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous 20mm gatling The Reason, katana on his back) not breaking stride, leveling the gatling as he runs. Camera tracks in front of him. Red strobe + muzzle flash. Audio: his pounding steps, then BRRRRRTTT. Cinematic charge-and-fire style.
Wide shot of the four guards collapsing in a spray of muzzle flashes. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: short BRRRT, bodies falling. Cinematic quick-work style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro sprinting over the bodies, the armor whining with effort. Camera tracks. Red strobe. Audio: footfalls, klaxon. Cinematic relentless-advance style.
Wide shot of YT scanning Rife's office walls. Her eyes settle on a ventilation grate high in the ceiling. Camera tracks her gaze upward. Red strobe. Audio: klaxon. Cinematic problem-solving style.
Medium two-shot of YT looking at Fido, then up at the grate, calculating. Camera holds static. Strobe. Audio: her: You can boost me. Cinematic plan-forming style.

Wide shot of YT stepping onto Fido's broad titanium-armored back. The creature lowers a little to accept her, bracing its legs. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: the creak of the rat-thing's exoskeleton. Cinematic monster-boost style.

Low-angle wide shot of Fido rising to its full height, bringing YT close to the ceiling grate. Vapor vents from its back. Camera holds low. Steam-wreathed. Audio: servo-hydraulic whirr. Cinematic amazing-creature style.

Close-up of YT smashing the ventilation grate out of its frame with a sharp elbow. The steel plate clatters away into the duct beyond. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: the crash of steel. Cinematic break-through style.
Wide tracking shot of YT hauling herself up into the ventilation duct, wriggling through. Camera tracks. Dim red light. Audio: her scuffling. Cinematic vent-crawl style.

Wide tracking shot of Fido dropping to all fours, backing up two steps, then hurling itself at the hydraulic door. Its titanium shoulder crumples the steel. Camera tracks the charge. Red strobe. Audio: a teeth-rattling BANG, wrenching metal. Cinematic brute-force style.
Wide shot of the hydraulic door bursting outward into the corridor, Fido stepping through calmly over it. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: the scrape of metal. Cinematic breach-complete style.

Wide shot in the corridor outside as a ceiling panel crashes down and YT drops from the ducting, landing in a crouch beside Fido. Camera holds wide. Red strobe. Audio: the metallic clang, her landing. Cinematic airborne-link-up style.
Medium two-shot of YT straightening beside Fido, grinning. Camera holds static. Red strobe. Audio: her: Okay. Let's find a ride. Cinematic reunion style.

Wide shot of RAVEN (the massive seven-foot Aleut with long black hair, Fu Manchu mustache, POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, in black leathers) standing calmly on a massive industrial freight elevator rising through the levels of the carrier. His Harley is parked beside him, sidecar and all. Camera tracks with the ascending elevator. Yellow work light. Audio: the groan of elevator cables. Cinematic villain-deployment style.
Close-up of Raven checking his thigh sheaths, confirming three more glass knives in place. Camera holds tight. Yellow light. Audio: the soft hiss of sheaths. Cinematic prep-up style.

Wide shot of the elevator doors opening onto a deck level, Raven kickstarting the Harley and idling out onto the deck. Camera holds wide. Yellow light. Audio: the Harley firing up, a deep rumble. Cinematic deployment style.

Wide tracking shot of a long hangar-level corridor. HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous 20mm gatling The Reason, katana on his back) emerges from one end at a run. At the other end, the Harley rumbles into view, Raven atop it, headlight piercing. Camera holds the center of the corridor. Red strobe mixed with Harley headlight. Audio: Hiro's footfalls, the Harley thunder, klaxon. Cinematic gunfight-showdown-setup style.
Wide shot of Hiro skidding to a stop and Raven easing the bike to idle, both frozen. Camera holds wide. Mixed light. Audio: the Harley idle, klaxon. Cinematic mexican-standoff-v2 style.
Close-up of Raven patting the sealed sidecar, a big grin. Camera holds tight. Headlight. Audio: Raven: Same rules asshole. You fire. We all die. Cinematic repeat-threat style.

Wide shot of Hiro releasing the gatling's cradle, letting it drop into its harness rest, drawing the katana instead. Camera holds wide. Mixed light. Audio: servo-thunk, the hiss of steel. Cinematic weapon-swap style.
Wide shot of Raven swinging off the bike, drawing his own long glass knife. He pops his neck from side to side. Camera holds wide. Headlight. Audio: knuckle pops. Cinematic brawl-prep style.

Wide tracking shot as both men begin walking slowly toward each other down the corridor, blades held low. Camera tracks the space between them. Red strobe + headlight. Audio: their boots, the klaxon. Cinematic approach-duel style.

Wide tracking shot as the two close and exchange a flurry of blade strikes - Hiro's katana meeting Raven's glass knife in ringing parries, sparks flying. Camera tracks the fight in rapid cuts. Strobing flash. Audio: rapid CLANG CLANG CLANG of steel on glass. Cinematic blade-battle style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro driving Raven back down the corridor with three fierce overhand cuts. Raven retreats skillfully. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: strikes. Cinematic advantage-offense style.

Wide tracking shot of Raven suddenly pivoting, his glass knife lancing in low under Hiro's guard, grazing the exoskeleton at the hip. Camera tracks the thrust. Strobe. Audio: the scrape of glass on armor. Cinematic counterstrike style.
Close-up two-shot of Hiro and Raven locked hilt to hilt, faces inches apart, both straining. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: their grunting breaths. Cinematic clinch style.
Close-up shot of Raven slamming his forehead into Hiro's helmet. Hiro staggers back. Camera holds tight. Strobing. Audio: a solid crack. Cinematic dirty-fight style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro staggered but swinging the katana low in a sweep. Raven leaps backward. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: the swoosh of steel. Cinematic recovery-strike style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with chrome visor-helmet) and Fido rounding a corner into the fight corridor. YT stops dead. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: her: Oh shit. Cinematic find-them style.
Close-up of Fido's amber eyes snapping to Raven, a low dangerous rumble rising in his chest. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: a sub-bass growl. Cinematic beast-locks-on style.
Close-up of Raven's face catching sight of YT over Hiro's shoulder mid-fight, a flash of recognition. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: Raven: Hey sweetheart. Cinematic distraction style.
Wide shot of YT cupping her mouth. Camera holds wide. Strobe. Audio: YT: HIRO. HE'S GOT A NUKE IN THE BIKE. Cinematic intel-drop style.
Close-up of Hiro behind the helmet, a grim grin. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: Hiro: Already know. Thanks. Cinematic teamwork style.
Wide tracking shot of Raven retreating toward his Harley, blade still raised. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: his low mutter: Interesting. Cinematic re-tactics style.
Wide shot of Raven swinging back onto the Harley, throttling, the headlight swelling. Camera holds wide. Harsh light. Audio: the Harley thunder. Cinematic villain-remount style.

Wide tracking shot of Raven driving the Harley straight at Hiro. Hiro leaps aside against the bulkhead. The bike roars past, sidecar nearly clipping him. Camera tracks the pass. Strobing. Audio: the roar and wind. Cinematic near-miss style.
Wide tracking shot of the Harley disappearing down the corridor toward the ship's exterior. Camera holds from behind. Strobe. Audio: Harley receding. Cinematic escape style.
Medium shot of Hiro pushing off the bulkhead, katana still in hand. Camera holds static. Strobe. Audio: his exhale. Cinematic dust-off style.

Wide tracking shot of YT and Fido reaching Hiro. Hiro's helmet turns to see them. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: Hiro: YT. What the hell are you doing here. How did you get out. Cinematic reunion-interrupted style.

Close-up of YT grabbing Hiro's armored forearm. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: YT: There's a chopper on the top deck. We steal it and we fly out of here right now before Raven comes back. You coming or what. Cinematic plan-of-attack style.
Close-up of Hiro looking at Fido, registering. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: Hiro: Is that one of the Rat Things. How did you. You know what, I don't even want to know. Cinematic puzzle style.
Close-up of YT. Camera holds tight. Strobe. Audio: YT: Listen. We don't have time for whatever this is. Move your armored ass. Cinematic impatient style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro, YT, and Fido pounding up a set of steel stairs toward the flight deck. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: their ascending footfalls. Cinematic ascend-ship style.

Wide shot as the three burst out a hatch onto the flight deck of the Enterprise. Open sky, late night, moonlight, the floating Raft spread around them. Two helicopters sit on landing pads. Camera holds wide. Moonlight. Audio: wind, klaxon muffled. Cinematic air-exit style.
Wide shot of Rife flight crew clustered around a Huey, running pre-flight. They turn at the sound. Camera holds wide. Moonlight. Audio: their shouts. Cinematic target-ID style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro raising the gatling and firing a short contained burst into the air above the crew's heads. Camera tracks. Muzzle flash. Audio: BRRRT. Cinematic suppression style.
Wide shot of the flight crew scattering from the chopper in panic. Camera holds wide. Moonlight + muzzle flash. Audio: their shouts and footfalls. Cinematic clear-aircraft style.
Wide tracking shot of YT sprinting to the Huey pilot door, yanking it open. Camera tracks. Rotor-wash. Audio: hinges, wind. Cinematic board-chopper style.

Wide shot of Fido bounding from the deck up into the Huey's side door. The whole aircraft rocks with the massive creature's weight. Camera holds wide. Moonlight. Audio: the thud, hydraulic protest. Cinematic monster-boards style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro sprinting across the deck, ammo belt trailing smoke, clambering into the co-pilot seat. Camera tracks. Moonlight. Audio: his armored clamber. Cinematic last-man style.

Close-up two-shot of Hiro in co-pilot and YT in pilot. Camera holds tight. Night. Audio: YT: Wait. Can you actually fly this thing. Hiro: A little. I flew a simulator once in Japan. You. YT: I'm fifteen dude what do you think. Hiro: Okay I lied I've never flown anything, we are both going to die. Cinematic teen-comedy-under-fire style.

Wide shot of Hiro fumbling through the overhead switch panel, the collective stick wobbling. Rotors begin spinning up. Camera holds wide. Instrument-light. Audio: turbine whine. Cinematic improvised-pilot style.

Wide low-angle shot of the rotor blades building RPM, the air beginning to beat down around the chopper. Camera holds low. Rotor-shadow strobing. Audio: rising turbine roar. Cinematic takeoff-build style.

Wide tracking shot of the Huey lifting unsteadily off the flight deck, wobbling side-to-side, then correcting. Camera tracks alongside in air. Moonlight. Audio: turbine roar, wind. Cinematic wobble-takeoff style.

Wide shot of L BOB RIFE (the stocky Texan media mogul in his 60s with a bushy gray mustache, in a western-cut cream suit) on the superstructure balcony watching the chopper lift off, his face dark with fury. Camera holds wide. Moonlight. Audio: his: GODDAMMIT. Cinematic villain-seething style.
Close-up of Rife yanking a handheld radio to his mouth. Camera holds tight. Moonlight. Audio: Rife: Raven. Chopper. Track it. Don't lose them. Cinematic command-bark style.
Wide shot of Raven on the deck below, one arm already revving the Harley, looking up at the departing chopper. Camera holds wide. Moonlight. Audio: Harley growl. Cinematic parallel-villain style.
Close-up of Raven's face, a slow smile. Camera holds tight. Moonlight. Audio: his: On it boss. Cinematic fast-thinking style.
Close-up of Rife in the radio. Camera holds tight. Moonlight. Audio: Rife: Get me the second chopper. I want them tracked to wherever they land. Cinematic escalation style.

Wide aerial tracking shot of the Huey climbing away from the Enterprise over the dark lashed-together Raft city sprawling beneath. Fires dot the outer ring. Camera tracks from alongside. Moonlight. Audio: rotor throb. Cinematic escape-over-chaos style.

Close-up POV through Hiro's visor, comm window showing NG (the Vietnamese man in the translucent amber life-support pouch, on a wheeled cradle). Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Ng: Hiro. Head for LAX. I am already airborne. Cinematic ally-still-helping style.

Close-up of Hiro turning to YT. Camera holds tight. Instrument light. Audio: Hiro: We're heading for LAX. Ng's meeting us on the tarmac with backup. YT: Oh great. I hope you remembered the airline tickets. Cinematic YT-humor style.

Wide aerial tracking shot of the Huey turning east, the Raft receding behind, LA coastline visible as a distant glow ahead. Camera tracks alongside. Moonlight + amber LA glow. Audio: rotor throb. Cinematic homeward style.

Wide shot of the chopper cabin. YT sits on the deck curled against Fido's side, one hand in his thermal fins. Camera holds wide. Instrument light. Audio: rotor muffled, Fido's purr. Cinematic quiet-moment style.

Close-up of Hiro's gloved hand opening his chest pouch, checking the clay envelope is intact. It is. Camera holds tight. Instrument light. Audio: the soft rustle of foam. Cinematic prize-secure style.
Close-up of the Huey's radar screen, a second blip appearing in pursuit from the west. Camera holds tight. Green radar-glow. Audio: a warning ping. Cinematic pursuit-detected style.
Close-up of Hiro's face. Camera holds tight. Green light. Audio: Hiro: Shit. He's gaining on us. Hang on to something. Cinematic incoming style.
Wide aerial tracking shot - far behind, another Huey with RIFE markings gaining gradually. Camera tracks between the two choppers. Night. Audio: distant rotor throb. Cinematic chase-on style.

Wide aerial shot of the LA basin below stretching in a grid of amber lights. LAX to the south, its blue runway lights visible. Camera pulls down toward the airport. Night. Audio: rotor throb. Cinematic destination style.
Close-up of YT at the window. Camera holds tight. Blue reflected light. Audio: YT: I see it. Cinematic spot-target style.
Wide aerial tracking shot of the Huey descending steeply toward the airport. Camera tracks alongside in the dive. Motion blur. Audio: engine sound shifting, wind noise. Cinematic steep-descent style.

Wide aerial shot of a large empty cargo apron at the edge of LAX, illuminated by blue runway lights. A single vehicle - Ng's mobile command firetruck van - is already parked in the middle. Camera tracks down. Blue-amber. Audio: rotor throb, distant jets. Cinematic landing-zone style.

Wide shot of Ng's cradle rolled out onto the tarmac beside the van, screens glowing. Mafia soldiers in dark suits ring the perimeter. Camera pans. Blue light. Audio: distant planes, wind. Cinematic rendezvous style.

Medium shot of UNCLE ENZO (a dignified Italian-American man in his early 70s with slicked-back silver hair and deep-set brown eyes, in a charcoal pinstripe three-piece suit) standing beside Ng, a long black overcoat over his pinstripe suit, hands in pockets. His face is calm but severe. Camera holds static. Blue-amber light. Audio: a distant airliner taking off. Cinematic don-arrives style.

Wide aerial tracking shot of the Huey touching down in a flurry of blown dust and fuel stink on the tarmac beside the van. Camera holds wide. Dust cloud. Audio: rotor wind-down. Cinematic landing style.

Wide tracking shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with chrome visor-helmet) jumping from the chopper cabin, Fido leaping out behind her. Camera tracks. Rotor-wind. Audio: her whoop, Fido's thud. Cinematic offload style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous 20mm gatling The Reason, katana on his back) stepping out, gatling across his arms. Camera tracks. Dust. Audio: servo-whine. Cinematic arrival style.
Wide tracking shot of Enzo walking across the tarmac to meet YT, arms slightly open. Camera tracks. Blue-amber light. Audio: his slow deliberate steps. Cinematic reunion-ceremony style.

Medium two-shot of Enzo reaching YT, laying both hands on her shoulders, bending to kiss her forehead. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Enzo softly: You are a credit to the family kid. Cinematic don-blessing style.
Close-up of YT flushing, trying not to grin. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her: Thanks Uncle E. Cinematic mafia-warm style.
Wide aerial shot overhead - the second Huey, Rife markings, dropping toward the tarmac from the west. Camera pans up. Night. Audio: its rotor thrum growing. Cinematic threat-arrives style.
Medium shot of Hiro stepping up to Ng and Enzo. Camera holds static. Mixed light. Audio: Hiro: Raven. Incoming. With the bike. Cinematic sitrep style.

Close-up of UNCLE ENZO (the silver-haired Mafia don in a charcoal pinstripe three-piece suit)'s face, calm, studying the dropping helicopter. Camera holds tight. Blue light. Audio: Enzo quietly: Good. Cinematic ominous-calm style.

Wide aerial tracking shot of the second Huey touching down a hundred yards away at the other end of the tarmac. A ramp drops. Camera tracks. Blue dust. Audio: rotor throb, wind. Cinematic enemy-arrives style.

Wide shot of Raven rolling the Harley off the chopper ramp onto the tarmac, boots down, silver sidecar glinting. Rife emerges behind him with four guards. Camera holds wide. Blue light. Audio: the Harley rumble, heavy boots. Cinematic villains-deploy style.
Wide shot of Rife striding forward onto the tarmac, hands on his belt, surveying the opposition. Camera holds wide. Blue-amber. Audio: Rife: WELL. Ain't this cozy. Cinematic standoff-greeting style.
Wide tracking shot of Enzo walking alone out toward the center of the tarmac, hands out of his pockets now. Camera tracks him. Blue light. Audio: his boots on asphalt. Cinematic don-challenge style.
Close-up of Enzo's hand emerging with a small folded STRAIGHT RAZOR, flicking it open. Camera holds tight. Blue gleam. Audio: the snick of the razor. Cinematic old-school-weapon style.
Close-up of Raven's face on the other bike, a slow grin spreading. He dismounts. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: his: Oh this is nostalgic. Cinematic old-grudge style.

scene_name: Raven Walks Out To Meet Enzo
original_prompt: Wide tracking shot of Raven crossing the tarmac toward Enzo, a glass knife appearing in his hand. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: his boots, Harley idling behind. Cinematic second-duel-setup style.

Wide aerial shot of the two men circling each other in the middle of the tarmac, everyone else frozen watching. Camera rotates around them from above. Blue-amber. Audio: wind, distant jets, their breathing. Cinematic ritual-circling style.

Medium two-shot of Enzo and Raven. Enzo's eyes are cold. Camera holds static. Blue. Audio: Enzo: You shouldn't have taken the girl. Raven: She shouldn't have been working for you old man. Cinematic verbal-daggers style.

Wide tracking shot of Enzo lunging in with startling speed, razor slashing low. Raven twists aside, counters with the glass knife. Camera tracks the strikes. Blue. Audio: the whip of steel, the clink of contact. Cinematic old-blade-duel style.

Close-up of Fido's amber eyes tracking over Enzo and Raven to fix on RIFE across the tarmac. A deep rumbling growl. Camera holds tight. Amber glow. Audio: the growl rising. Cinematic target-shift style.
Close-up of YT's hand on Fido's thermal fins, trying to hold him. Camera holds tight. Amber. Audio: Fido straining. Cinematic restraining-beast style.

Wide tracking shot of the duel intensifying. Enzo is impossibly fast for his age, but Raven is faster and stronger. Enzo takes a slash to the arm, blood blooming on his pinstripes. Camera tracks. Blue strobe. Audio: the ringing and whipping of blades, their grunts. Cinematic evenly-matched-violence style.

Wide shot of Enzo stumbling back, Raven's knife across his ribs. Enzo sinks to one knee on the tarmac, hand pressed to the wound, razor still held. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: his sharp exhale, blood dripping. Cinematic don-wounded style.
Close-up of YT's face. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: YT: NO. Cinematic teen-anguish style.
Wide tracking shot of Raven stepping in over Enzo to finish him. Raising the knife. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: Raven: This is for my father. Cinematic execution-imminent style.

Close-up of Enzo, on one knee, suddenly driving the razor up into Raven's groin with every remaining ounce of his strength. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Enzo grunts, Raven GAAAAGH. Cinematic reversal-strike style.
Wide tracking shot of Raven bellowing, staggering back, blood soaking his black leathers. His knife falls. Camera tracks him. Blue. Audio: his guttural roar. Cinematic injured-giant style.
Wide shot of Raven crashing backward onto the tarmac, hands clutching himself, teeth bared. Camera holds wide. Blue. Audio: the body thud. Cinematic downed-antagonist style.
Close-up of YT's hand releasing from Fido's fins. Camera holds tight. Amber glow. Audio: her: GO. Cinematic unleash style.

Wide tracking shot of Fido exploding into full sprint across the tarmac, a titanium streak trailing thermal vapor, rat-thing exoskeleton opened to full gallop. Camera tracks alongside. Blue-amber. Audio: its metallic hammering footfalls, a bone-rattling roar. Cinematic unleashed-weapon style.
Wide shot of Rife turning, his jovial face collapsing into terror as the titanium shape hurtles toward him. Camera holds wide. Blue. Audio: Rife: NO NO NO. Cinematic recognition-of-doom style.
Wide tracking shot of Rife sprinting toward the Harley, his guards raising weapons. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: his labored panting, rifle-clatter. Cinematic cowardly-flight style.

Wide tracking shot of Fido streaking past the guards without engaging them, locked on only Rife. Guards fire into its flanks, bullets sparking off titanium armor. Camera tracks. Muzzle flashes. Audio: automatic fire, bullet pings. Cinematic single-target style.
Wide shot of Rife vaulting onto Raven's Harley, kicking the start. The bike thunders to life. Camera holds wide. Blue. Audio: Harley firing up. Cinematic desperate-ride style.

Wide tracking shot of the Harley tearing across the tarmac, sidecar swaying, Rife hunched over the bars. Fido galloping behind. Camera tracks. Blue blur. Audio: Harley roar, Fido's metallic thunder. Cinematic chase-on-tarmac style.

Wide aerial tracking shot. The Harley is fast but Fido is faster. In ten seconds the titanium creature closes the gap. Camera tracks from above. Blue. Audio: engines and running, accelerating. Cinematic gaining style.
Wide tracking shot of Fido launching off the tarmac in an enormous arc, titanium-fanged jaws open wide. Camera tracks the leap. Blue-amber. Audio: a slow whoosh. Cinematic pounce style.

Wide shot of Fido hitting Rife in mid-flight, the impact driving them both backward off the bike and rolling across the tarmac in a tangle. Camera holds wide. Blue. Audio: the massive impact, Rife's scream cut off. Cinematic takedown style.

Wide tracking shot of the Harley, rider-less, tumbling end-over-end across the tarmac. The sealed silver sidecar pops free and skids separately in a shower of sparks. Camera tracks the wreck. Blue-orange sparks. Audio: metal-on-asphalt grinding. Cinematic wreckage style.
Close-up of YT's face realizing the sidecar - the nuke - is now loose. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: her: Oh no. Cinematic dead-mans-switch style.

Wide shot of Fido standing over Rife's crumpled body in the middle of the tarmac, amber eyes still blazing, jaws dripping. Rife is utterly still. Camera holds wide. Blue-amber. Audio: Fido's heavy breathing, a final low rumble. Cinematic kill-confirmed style.

Close-up overhead of Rife's face on the tarmac, eyes open, mustache disheveled. A small trickle of blood at his mouth. Utterly still. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: silence. Cinematic villain-end style.
Wide tracking shot of YT sprinting across to Enzo, dropping to her knees beside him. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: her panic-breaths. Cinematic dear-friend style.

Close-up of Enzo on the ground, hand clutching his ribs, a pained but real smile on his old face. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Enzo softly: I'm okay kid. I'm okay. Cinematic veteran-survives style.
Wide tracking shot of Mafia medics with a stretcher rushing onto the tarmac. YT makes room. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: their rushed shouts in Italian. Cinematic rescue-arrives style.

Wide aerial shot pulling up and away from the tarmac - the chopper, the van, the medics working on Enzo, Fido standing guard over Rife's body, the loose sidecar gleaming alone at the edge of the apron. Camera pulls high. Blue. Audio: a low synth drone rising, distant jets. Cinematic act-close style.

Wide shot of the sealed silver sidecar lying on its side on the tarmac, fifty yards from the nearest person. Moonlight glints off its polished shell. Camera holds wide low. Blue runway light. Audio: wind, a distant jet. Cinematic doomsday-object style.

Wide shot of HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous gatling gun, katana on his back) raising his voice across the tarmac. Camera holds wide. Blue. Audio: Hiro: EVERYONE AWAY FROM THE SIDECAR. RAVEN'S HEART STOPS, THAT THING ARMS. Cinematic warning-shouted style.

Wide tracking shot of the Mafia soldiers and medics retreating from the center of the tarmac, hauling Enzo on the stretcher. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: their urgent shouts. Cinematic clear-the-area style.

Wide tracking shot of NG (the Vietnamese man in the translucent amber life-support pouch, on a wheeled cradle)'s cradle rolling smoothly toward the sidecar, ignoring the evacuation. Screens around him project sensor data onto the air. Camera tracks. Blue + tech-green glow. Audio: the whirr of his cradle. Cinematic expert-incoming style.
Wide tracking shot of YT sprinting to where Raven lies curled on the tarmac. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: her footsteps. Cinematic medic-improvise style.
Close-up of Raven on the ground, face gray, breathing shallow and ragged. Blood pooling around him. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: his faint labored breath. Cinematic dying-villain style.

Medium shot of YT dropping to her knees beside Raven, hands pressed to the wound at his groin to slow bleeding. Camera holds static. Blue. Audio: her muttering: Don't die don't die don't die. Cinematic emergency-triage style.
Close-up of Raven's face, eyes half-open, his bloodied lips pulling into a weak grin. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Raven raspy: Sweetheart. Cinematic dying-amusement style.

Wide tracking shot of Ng's cradle rolling up cautiously beside the sidecar. A robotic arm extends from his harness carrying a small scanner. Camera tracks. Blue + scanner-green. Audio: the scanner's soft ping. Cinematic bomb-tech style.

Close-up of the sidecar's side as Ng's scanner passes over it, projecting a translucent cross-section in the air - a warhead, a simple trigger, a heartbeat sensor with a faint green trace. Camera tracks the hologram. Green tech-light. Audio: a regular heartbeat ping. Cinematic bomb-reveal style.
Close-up of Ng's face in the cradle, eyes sharp, fingers twitching on concealed controls. Camera holds tight. Green. Audio: his hum of concentration. Cinematic expert-at-work style.

Close-up POV through Hiro's visor, Ng's face in the comm window. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Ng: It is a simple dead man trigger. Relay from a wristband on Raven. If his pulse falls below 40 for six seconds, it arms. Cinematic expert-diagnosis style.
Close-up of Hiro's face behind the visor. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Hiro: Can you disarm it. Cinematic pragmatic style.

Medium shot of Ng, another robotic arm extending with a set of precision tools, delicately removing a steel service panel from the sidecar. Camera holds static. Green tech-light. Audio: the whirr of drivers. Cinematic panel-removal style.

Close-up of the sidecar interior - a cylindrical warhead nested in foam, surrounded by wiring and a single small circuit board with a blinking green LED. Camera pushes in. Green glow. Audio: a low continuous tone. Cinematic nuke-exposed style.

Close-up of YT's hand lifting Raven's heavy leather sleeve, revealing a black wristband with a tiny LCD showing a heart rate - falling numbers: 46, 44, 42. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: her: Ng. His pulse is dropping. Cinematic urgency-spikes style.
Close-up of Ng's face, hands still working. Camera holds tight. Green light. Audio: Ng: Keep him alive. Ninety seconds. Cinematic race-against-clock style.

Wide shot of YT leaning her whole weight on the compression. Her kourier coverall is now slick with Raven's blood. Camera holds wide. Blue. Audio: her grunt of effort. Cinematic life-saving-the-enemy style.
Close-up of Raven's face, now barely conscious. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Raven faint: Why. YT: Because fuck that sidecar. Cinematic pragmatic-mercy style.

Close-up of Ng's robotic arm with a tiny pair of micro-snippers gently isolating and cutting a single red wire inside the sidecar, leaving a gray one intact. Camera holds tight. Green. Audio: the tiny metallic snip. Cinematic defuse-moment style.
Close-up of the circuit board LED flickering, going from green to amber to dark. Camera holds tight. Amber fade. Audio: the low tone dies. Cinematic disarm-confirmed style.
Close-up of Ng's face relaxing a fraction. Camera holds tight. Green. Audio: Ng quietly: Disarmed. Safe. Cinematic expert-relief style.

Wide shot of Ng rolling back from the sidecar, a robotic arm pulling the small warhead cleanly out and securing it in a shielded case. Camera holds wide. Green. Audio: Ng: All clear. Cinematic threat-neutralized style.

Wide aerial shot of the tarmac as the Mafia soldiers visibly relax, lowering weapons, medics returning to Enzo. Camera tracks from above. Blue. Audio: a collective exhale. Cinematic tension-breaks style.
Medium shot of YT still kneeling, still pressing the wound, Raven's face paling further. Camera holds static. Blue. Audio: his fading breath. Cinematic compassion-unexpected style.
Close-up of Raven's face, lips moving. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: Raven whispered: My father. Tell them. Amchitka. YT quietly: I'll tell them. Cinematic fatal-benediction style.
Close-up of Raven's face. His eyes unfocus. The breath leaves him. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: silence. Cinematic death-of-antagonist style.
Close-up of YT's bloody hand passing gently over Raven's face, closing his eyes. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: her soft: Okay. Cinematic respect-for-dead style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO (the cappuccino-skinned man in the powered exoskeletal combat harness with the enormous gatling gun, katana on his back) walking across the tarmac to Ng. Camera tracks. Blue. Audio: armored steps. Cinematic main-business style.
Close-up of Hiro opening his chest pouch. The clay envelope sits intact. Camera holds tight. Blue. Audio: the soft rustle. Cinematic prize-still-secure style.

Medium two-shot of Hiro and Ng beside the cradle. Camera holds static. Blue + green. Audio: Hiro: Rife was broadcasting tonight. Global nam-shub transmission. From the concert venue on the Enterprise. Ng: Yes. Cinematic final-objective style.

Medium shot of Hiro. Camera holds static. Blue. Audio: Hiro: If his fiber uplink is still hot, we still have a problem. The broadcast goes regardless. Every screen. Every person wired to a virus-receptive brain. I need to get into the Metaverse now. Cinematic urgency style.
Close-up of Ng nodding. Camera holds tight. Green. Audio: Ng: We have a rig in the van. Go. Cinematic let-it-happen style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro stepping out of the exoskeleton inside the van, now in his black jumpsuit, strapping on Metaverse goggles. Camera tracks. Cool blue screen-light. Audio: servo-release of armor, the click of goggles. Cinematic dive-preparation style.

Medium shot of HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) settling into a padded chair in the van, goggles down, hand on a haptic glove. Camera holds static. Blue. Audio: a soft electronic tone. Cinematic dive-in style.

Close-up of the goggles as tiny screens behind the lenses bloom with the Metaverse boot sequence - geometric blue patterns. Camera holds tight. Blue flash. Audio: the whoosh of virtual load. Cinematic dive-transition style.

Wide shot dissolving from the van interior to a wide boulevard of the Metaverse's Street - a virtual avenue a hundred meters wide, glowing neon signs stacked high on both sides, avatars of every description moving along. Camera holds wide. Virtual neon. Audio: ambient virtual hum, snippets of distant music. Cinematic Street-arrival style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO'S AVATAR (a lean mixed-race man identical to Hiro, in a black leather kimono with two samurai swords at his belt, standing in the virtual Metaverse) walking swiftly down the Street. His avatar is as fast as any in the Metaverse, weaving around slower avatars. Camera tracks alongside. Neon-strobe. Audio: the hum of the virtual street. Cinematic hero-in-metaverse style.

Close-up of Hiro's avatar tapping his wrist. A hypercard floats up with the silver-bearded Librarian's face. Camera holds tight. Cloud-light. Audio: Hiro: The Rife Bible broadcast stadium. Now. Cinematic instant-help style.
Close-up insert of the Librarian. Camera holds tight. Cloud-light. Audio: Librarian: Marked sir. Portal established. Cinematic aide style.
Wide shot of a golden portal rippling open in midair in front of Hiro's avatar. Camera holds wide. Gold light. Audio: the soft ripple-hum. Cinematic instant-travel style.
Wide tracking shot of Hiro's avatar walking into the portal. Camera tracks behind. Gold light. Audio: a whoosh. Cinematic portal-enter style.

Wide aerial shot of the Metaverse RIFE BIBLE STADIUM - a colossal coliseum-like structure, bigger than any real stadium, rendered in gleaming white marble and chrome, its open-air bowl blazing with enormous holographic lightshows. Hundreds of thousands of avatar silhouettes pack the tiered stands in concentric rings descending to a central broadcast stage. Camera descends from high altitude. Mixed spotlight-white and violet strobe rising from the stage. Audio: the dull roar of a hundred thousand voices, the thunder of preacher-style music. Cinematic mega-stadium-reveal style.

Wide sweeping shot panning around the stadium interior. Every seat is an avatar. Giant jumbotron screens ring the upper rim showing Rife's face beaming warmly. Banners hang: RIFE INTERNATIONAL BIBLE COLLEGE. Camera pans slowly. Jumbotron-wash. Audio: crowd roar, broadcast music swelling. Cinematic revival-meeting-on-steroids style.

Wide tracking shot at stadium-concourse level. Avatars of every description stream through the vaulted entrance archways into the seating bowl - businessmen, punks, animal avatars, cartoon avatars. They walk in silent orderly lockstep like pilgrims, eyes forward. Camera tracks alongside. White-marble light. Audio: the shuffle of virtual footsteps, the distant preacher-voice bleeding through. Cinematic cult-procession style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO'S AVATAR (a lean mixed-race man identical to Hiro, in a black leather kimono with two samurai swords at his belt, standing in the virtual Metaverse) stepping through one of the archways onto the upper concourse, looking down over the rim into the stadium bowl. Camera tracks behind him. Stadium light. Audio: the roar rising from below. Cinematic vantage-point style.

Wide low-angle shot from Hiro's POV looking down into the vast bowl. Descending rings of avatars stretching into dizzying depths, all focused on the central stage far below. Camera tilts down slowly. Jumbotron-reflection. Audio: the rolling roar of the crowd. Cinematic overwhelm-of-scale style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro's avatar descending an aisle between tightly-packed sections of seated avatars, katana and wakizashi now drawn. The seated avatars barely notice him, eyes glued forward. Camera tracks. Stadium wash. Audio: his footsteps, the preacher-music. Cinematic descent-through-the-faithful style.

Close-up tracking shot past rows of seated avatars, faces tilted toward the stage, mouths slightly open, eyes glassy. A businessman, a teenage girl, a samurai, a cartoon rabbit - all wearing the same hypnotized expression. Camera tracks. Stadium wash. Audio: a low murmur of crowd-breathing. Cinematic mass-hypnosis style.

Wide shot of Hiro reaching the field level where a railing separates seats from the enormous central stage. Camera holds wide. Stage-light. Audio: the preacher-voice booming. Cinematic front-row style.

Wide low-angle shot looking up at the enormous central broadcast stage in the middle of the stadium field. RAVEN'S AVATAR (the massive seven-foot Aleut with long black hair, Fu Manchu mustache, and POOR IMPULSE CONTROL forehead tattoo, rendered in the Metaverse in full black leathers with a long glass knife, pixel-edges showing faintly on his silhouette) stands alone at a pulsing black obelisk-console at stage center, twisted cuneiform glyphs rotating on holograms taller than buildings behind him. Though his physical body died minutes ago, his avatar still runs on Rife's Metaverse servers. Camera tilts up. Violet-white stage strobe. Audio: Raven's voice amplified across the stadium, echoing through the bowl: BEHOLD THE LAST MESSAGE. Cinematic villain-on-stage style.

Medium shot of Hiro's avatar freezing at the field-level railing, eyes locking on Raven at the obelisk-console across the stadium field. Camera holds static. Stage-strobe. Audio: Raven's continued amplified chanting rolling through the bowl. Cinematic target-acquired style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro's avatar vaulting the railing onto the broad stadium field, sprinting for the stage. Camera tracks. Strobe. Audio: his virtual footsteps on synthetic turf. Cinematic onto-the-field style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro's avatar vaulting fifty feet up onto the elevated stage in a single bound - physics optional in the Metaverse. The crowd's murmur shifts. Camera tracks the leap. Violet-strobe. Audio: a digital whoosh, a ripple through the stadium. Cinematic virtual-leap style.
Wide shot of Raven turning slowly to face Hiro, a pixel-edged grin spreading. Camera holds wide. Strobe. Audio: Raven amplified: You finally made it. Cinematic showdown-start style.

Medium shot of Hiro's avatar walking forward down the stage. Camera tracks. Violet. Audio: Hiro: I killed you already. Raven: The meatspace is irrelevant. This is where it counts. Cinematic virtual-duel style.

Close-up of Raven's avatar drawing a glowing glass katana, the blade longer and more impossible than any real sword. Camera holds tight. Violet-white. Audio: the swell of the sword's summoning chime. Cinematic avatar-weapon style.
Close-up of Hiro's avatar drawing both katana and wakizashi, a blade in each hand. Camera holds tight. Violet light. Audio: a doubled hiss of steel. Cinematic two-sword-stance style.

Wide tracking shot as the two charge each other at virtual speed. Their blades clash in a shower of digital sparks. Camera tracks the impact. White-violet strobe. Audio: an impossibly amplified ring of steel. Cinematic avatar-battle style.

Wide tracking shot of a furious exchange - Hiro dual-wielding, parries from Raven's massive glass blade, pixel-sparks spraying with every contact. They move at twice real-world speed. Camera tracks the choreography. Strobe. Audio: rapid-fire clangs. Cinematic virtual-swordfight style.

Wide shot of Raven driving Hiro back across the stage with a two-handed overhead strike, Hiro blocking with crossed blades. Camera holds wide. Strobe. Audio: the impact. Cinematic powerful-pressure style.

Close-up of Raven's face, mouth opening, a cascade of binary syllables pouring out that visibly distort the air around him - the nam-shub weaponized. Camera holds tight. Violet distortion. Audio: a stream of binary-sounding spoken code. Cinematic weaponized-language style.
Close-up of Hiro's avatar face, lip tight, teeth clenched. The vaccine is working. Camera holds tight. Violet. Audio: his growl. Cinematic vaccine-holds style.
Close-up of Raven's face flickering with uncertainty. Camera holds tight. Violet. Audio: Raven: What. Cinematic plot-twist style.

Close-up of Hiro's avatar tapping the wrist of his kimono sleeve. A small icon appears there - a green shield. Camera holds tight. Gold icon. Audio: Hiro: Juanita's gift. Cinematic hidden-protection style.

Wide low-angle shot above the stage as a second golden portal opens. A glowing female figure in a flowing white robe descends from it - JUANITA'S AVATAR (the Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair and olive skin, rendered in a flowing white robe, standing in a golden glow in the Metaverse). Camera holds low. Gold-white. Audio: a rising angelic chord. Cinematic ally-descent style.
Wide shot of Juanita's avatar landing gracefully on the stage opposite Raven, hands raised. Camera holds wide. Gold-violet. Audio: the chord resolving. Cinematic arrival style.
Close-up of Hiro's avatar face. Camera holds tight. Gold-violet. Audio: Hiro: You made it. Cinematic partner-arrives style.
Close-up of Juanita's avatar face, serene but focused. Camera holds tight. Gold. Audio: Juanita: The broadcast is at ninety seconds. Go. Cinematic time-pressure style.
Wide shot of Juanita stepping between Raven and Hiro. Raven's pixel-edges flicker. Camera holds wide. Gold-violet. Audio: Juanita: Hello Dmitri. Cinematic call-by-true-name style.
Close-up of Raven's face, the Fu Manchu mustache twitching. Camera holds tight. Violet. Audio: Raven: You. Cinematic name-power style.

Medium shot of Juanita's avatar, one hand extended. She begins speaking a counter-stream of syllables in a calm clear voice. The air around Raven starts to shimmer and shake. Camera holds static. Gold waves. Audio: her clean Sumerian-sounding counter-incantation. Cinematic priestess-power style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro's avatar racing across the stage to the pulsing central console where the broadcast is originating. Camera tracks. Violet-strobe. Audio: the console hum, Juanita's incantation in background. Cinematic race-to-console style.

Close-up of Hiro's avatar reaching into his kimono and producing a virtual representation of the clay envelope - glowing cuneiform. Camera holds tight. Gold light. Audio: the soft chime of the virtual object. Cinematic artifact-invoked style.

Medium tracking shot of Hiro pressing the virtual envelope into a receiver slot on the console. The cuneiform blazes up in gold. Camera tracks the placement. Gold light. Audio: a deep bell-tone. Cinematic nam-shub-engaged style.

Close-up of the envelope breaking apart into streaming lines of ancient Sumerian glyphs that pour into the console's data channels. Camera holds tight. Gold-white stream. Audio: a rising choral tone. Cinematic decompile-sumerian style.

Wide shot of the broadcast waveforms on the stage holograms beginning to invert and redistribute - the violet glossolalia tones converting to gold choral tones. Camera holds wide. Color-shift. Audio: the shift of frequencies. Cinematic signal-rewrite style.

Close-up of Raven's avatar face, features distorting into pixellated static, his mouth opening in a digital scream. Camera holds tight. Strobing distortion. Audio: his modulated roar. Cinematic deletion-begins style.

Wide shot of Juanita's avatar, hand still extended. She speaks the final syllable. The wave of gold sound that has been building from her rolls across the stage and engulfs Raven. Camera holds wide. Gold wash. Audio: her final resolute word. Cinematic counterspell-complete style.

Wide tracking shot of Raven's avatar fragmenting into a cloud of pixels that disperses upward into the open sky above the stadium. Camera tracks the dissolution. Pixel-rain. Audio: a reverse-roar. Cinematic avatar-destroyed style.

Wide tracking shot across the packed stadium stands. The zombified avatars are blinking, looking around, confused. Their posture shifts from rapt worship to disorientation. Camera tracks along a row. Soft blue dawn-light seeping in from above. Audio: a growing murmur of confused voices building into a wave. Cinematic crowd-awakens style.
Close-up of a single avatar - a businessman - shaking his head, clearing his eyes. Camera holds tight. Soft light. Audio: his: What. What was I. Cinematic awakening-individual style.

Wide aerial tracking shot of the avatars rising from their seats in tidal waves, flooding up the aisles and out through the archways. Camera tracks overhead. Soft light. Audio: their rising murmur, the rumble of a hundred thousand footsteps. Cinematic mass-dispersal style.

Wide two-shot of Juanita and Hiro standing at the center of the enormous stage, the stadium bowl emptying around them into thin streams of departing avatars. Camera pulls back high. Gold-soft light. Audio: receding footsteps echoing through the vast space. Cinematic heroes-surveying style.
Close-up of Juanita's face breaking into a real tired smile. Camera holds tight. Gold light. Audio: Juanita: It's over. Cinematic relief style.
Close-up of Hiro's face, a returning smile. Camera holds tight. Gold light. Audio: Hiro: It's over. Cinematic mutual-relief style.

Wide aerial shot of the Raft at dawn. The broadcast-zombified refugees - thousands of them wearing headphones, staring at TVs - are all simultaneously looking up, taking off the headphones, looking around at each other as if for the first time. Camera pans over the Raft. Pink dawn. Audio: a single distant voice, then a chorus of confused murmur spreading. Cinematic global-awakening style.

Close-up of a young Korean woman on a Raft deck, pulling off her headphones, blinking at the sunrise. Her face is confused, then softening. Camera holds tight. Pink light. Audio: her quiet: Ah. Cinematic individual-awakens style.

Wide tracking shot of a group of refugee children running between boats, laughing, pulling each other along - newly awake, newly alive. Camera tracks. Pink light. Audio: their laughter. Cinematic children-freed style.

Wide aerial shot of Los Angeles at dawn. On a dozen giant LED billboards across the skyline, images of L Bob Rife's face - smiling, preaching - flicker to static and then go dark. Camera pans across. Dawn-gold. Audio: the soft buzz of dying TVs. Cinematic media-empire-ends style.
Wide aerial shot of the LA suburban sprawl at dawn. Houses, still, peaceful. Camera pulls back high. Dawn-gold. Audio: a single distant rooster. Cinematic quiet-world style.
Close-up of Juanita's avatar hand reaching out to take Hiro's. Their hands meet. Camera holds tight. Gold light. Audio: the soft ambient hum. Cinematic hands-meet style.

Close-up two-shot of Hiro and Juanita's avatar faces, looking at each other. Camera holds tight. Gold. Audio: Juanita: Meet me. Real world. The Quad cafe at noon. Hiro: Yeah. I'd like that. Cinematic reunion-setup style.
Medium shot of Juanita's avatar leaning forward, pressing her lips briefly to Hiro's avatar forehead. Camera holds static. Gold light. Audio: the faintest brush. Cinematic gentle-benediction style.
Medium shot of Juanita stepping back, waving once. Her avatar begins to fade. Camera holds static. Gold. Audio: her: Get some sleep first. Cinematic fade-out style.
Wide shot of Juanita's avatar shimmering out of the Metaverse in a soft gold dissolve. Camera holds wide. Gold wash. Audio: a soft chord. Cinematic logoff style.

Wide shot of Hiro's avatar alone at the center of the vast empty stage, swords still in hand. The violet broadcast lights have given way to a warm pre-dawn gold filling the open stadium. Empty seats stretch away in every direction. Camera pulls back high. Gold-violet. Audio: a low resolution chord, wind. Cinematic hero-alone style.
Close-up of Hiro's avatar sliding the katana and wakizashi back into their sheaths. Camera holds tight. Gold light. Audio: two soft metallic clicks. Cinematic weapons-at-rest style.
Wide shot of Hiro's avatar tapping his wrist. His avatar flickers and dissolves. Camera holds wide. Gold fade. Audio: a quiet logoff chime. Cinematic end-session style.

Wide shot inside Ng's van. HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, katana across his back, wearing a black arachnofiber jumpsuit) pulls off the goggles, blinking into the normal world. Early dawn light filters through the van's small windows. Camera pulls back. Cool blue-pink. Audio: the van's cooling fans, distant airport hum. Cinematic reentry style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro stepping out of the van onto the tarmac. The sky is streaked pink and gold. The LAX runway lights are fading as the sun rises. Camera tracks behind him. Dawn light. Audio: wind, distant airliner, a single bird. Cinematic post-climax style.

Medium shot of Enzo on the stretcher, bandaged but alert, sitting up slightly. He raises a hand to Hiro as Hiro passes. Camera holds static. Dawn. Audio: Enzo: Ciao ragazzo. Hiro: Ciao. Cinematic don-acknowledges style.

Wide shot of YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl in the fluorescent blue-and-orange RadiKS Kourier coverall with chrome visor-helmet) sitting cross-legged on the tarmac beside the now-empty sidecar, Fido curled protectively at her back. Camera holds wide. Dawn. Audio: quiet. Cinematic quiet-moment style.
Medium tracking shot of Hiro walking up and sitting down on the tarmac beside YT, shoulder to shoulder. Camera tracks. Dawn. Audio: his exhale. Cinematic companions style.

Close-up two-shot as YT digs into her coverall pocket and pulls out a flattened stick of bubblegum, offering it to Hiro. Camera holds tight. Dawn. Audio: YT: Gum. Hiro: Thanks kid. Cinematic teen-gesture style.
Wide shot of the three figures - Hiro, YT, Fido - sitting on the tarmac as the sun comes up. Hiro slowly chews the gum. Camera pulls back. Dawn-gold. Audio: wind. Cinematic breath-of-relief style.

scene_name: Act 4C End - Pull Back On Sunrise
original_prompt: Wide aerial shot pulling up and back from the tarmac, taking in the van, the chopper, the tiny figures of Hiro and YT and Fido, the empty sidecar, Enzo's stretcher being loaded into an SUV, the rising sun over the LA basin. Camera rises high. Pink-gold. Audio: a swelling orchestral coda. Cinematic finale-sunrise style.

Wide aerial shot of the WHITE COLUMNS BURBCLAVE - an immaculate gated suburb of identical colonial-style houses, each with a small patch of lawn. Camera pans down from high altitude. Soft morning light. Audio: distant sprinklers, a single bird. Cinematic suburbia style.
Wide tracking shot down a curving street of identical houses. The rising sun throws long shadows. Camera tracks parallel. Gold light. Audio: a distant sprinkler. Cinematic quiet-burbclave style.

Wide shot of a long black Mafia limousine parked at the curb of one colonial-style house, incongruous against the suburban backdrop. Camera holds wide. Gold light. Audio: the idle hum of the limo. Cinematic don-style-return style.

Wide tracking shot of the limo door opening. YT (the fifteen-year-old blonde girl, now out of the Kourier coverall, in a grey tank top and plaid pajama pants, hair loose around her shoulders) steps out - she has changed clothes, her hair loose for once. She carries her chrome visor-helmet in one hand. Camera tracks her. Gold. Audio: the door thunking shut. Cinematic homecoming style.
Wide tracking shot of YT walking up the short concrete path to the front door. Camera tracks behind. Gold. Audio: her soft footsteps on concrete. Cinematic homecoming-private style.

Medium shot of the front door opening before YT's hand reaches it. YT'S MOM (a nervous fortyish woman with dyed strawberry-blonde hair in a tight ponytail, a federal-employee pantsuit, glasses, wringing her hands) stands in the doorway, eyes red, fist pressed to her mouth. Camera holds static. Dim interior + gold door-frame. Audio: the mother's sharp inhale. Cinematic relieved-mother style.

Wide tracking shot of the mother reaching out and pulling YT into a fierce long hug, half in the doorway. YT stiffens then relaxes. Camera tracks in. Gold + warm interior light. Audio: the mother whispered: Oh baby oh baby. Cinematic real-hug style.

Close-up of YT's face against her mother's shoulder, eyes unreadable, arms slowly coming up to return the embrace. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: their breathing. Cinematic rare-vulnerability style.

Medium two-shot of the mother holding YT at arms length, examining her daughter's face. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Mother: Are you hurt. Did they. YT: Mom I'm fine. I'm home. Cinematic examination-caring style.
Close-up of the mother nodding rapidly, trying not to cry. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Mother: Okay. Okay. Cinematic composing-self style.

Wide tracking shot of mother and daughter moving into the bright white kitchen. Morning sun streams through sheer curtains. Camera tracks. Gold-white. Audio: the soft click of shoes on linoleum. Cinematic mundane-comfort style.
Medium shot of the mother at the stove, cracking eggs into a pan, hands shaking slightly. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the sizzle of butter. Cinematic cooking-comfort style.
Medium shot of YT slumping into a kitchen chair at the small table, putting her face in her hands for a moment. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the exhale. Cinematic finally-safe style.

Close-up of a plate of eggs and toast appearing on the table in front of YT - real food, hot, butter melting. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the soft clunk of the plate. Cinematic real-breakfast style.

Medium shot of YT picking up a fork and digging into the eggs with undignified hunger. The mother watches from the stove, trying not to smile. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: rapid eating. Cinematic starving-teen style.

Medium shot of the mother wiping her hands on a dish towel, coming to sit across from YT. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Mother carefully: Would you like to tell me. YT full mouth: Later mom. Cinematic too-much-to-say style.
Close-up of the mother nodding, accepting. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Mother: Okay sweetheart. Cinematic good-mom style.

Wide shot through the kitchen sliding glass door - out in the small suburban backyard, FIDO (the massive titanium-clad rat thing with glowing amber eyes, thermal fins venting vapor along its spine) is curled up on the grass like an enormous dog, thermal fins dormant, amber eyes closed. Camera holds wide through glass. Soft morning. Audio: sprinkler in the next yard. Cinematic monster-as-pet style.

Close-up of the mother's face glancing past YT and seeing Fido in the backyard, her eyebrows going up slowly. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Mother: Is that. YT: That's Fido. He's staying. Cinematic mom-absorbs style.
Close-up of the mother nodding slowly, accepting. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Mother: Does he eat dog food. YT: I think he eats people actually mom. Cinematic deadpan-humor style.

Wide shot of a lavish private hospital suite - more hotel than hospital, oil paintings on the walls, a crystal vase of yellow roses. UNCLE ENZO (the dignified Italian-American man in his early 70s, now in a hospital bed in silk pajamas, slicked silver hair, a bandage across his ribs, sharp alert eyes) reclines in the adjustable bed, reading a leatherbound book. Camera pulls back. Warm lamp-light. Audio: classical music playing softly, a heart monitor's soft beep. Cinematic don-recovers style.

Wide tracking shot of a nurse quietly leaving the room with a tray. Enzo waves her off without looking up. Camera tracks her out. Warm light. Audio: the soft click of the door. Cinematic discreet-care style.
Close-up of the door opening a few inches. YT's blonde head pokes through. Camera holds static on the door. Warm light. Audio: YT: Uncle E. Is this a bad. Cinematic visiting style.
Close-up of Enzo's face breaking into a genuine smile, setting the book aside. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Enzo: Kid. Come in. Cinematic warm-welcome style.
Wide tracking shot of YT stepping into the suite, hands in her pockets, looking oddly shy. Camera tracks. Warm light. Audio: her bare feet on carpet. Cinematic uncharacteristic-shyness style.
Medium shot of Enzo gesturing toward a plush armchair beside his bed. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Enzo: Sit down. Sit down. Cinematic invitation style.
Medium shot of YT folding into the armchair, drawing her knees up. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the creak of leather. Cinematic tucked-in style.
Close-up two-shot of Enzo looking at her, and YT looking back, an unspoken understanding. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the heart monitor beep. Cinematic wordless-respect style.

Medium shot of Enzo opening a small drawer in the nightstand beside the bed, taking out a small velvet box. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the soft click of the drawer. Cinematic ceremonial-moment style.
Medium shot of Enzo extending the box to YT with both hands. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Enzo: These were mine. Vietnam, 1969. Cinematic gift-offer style.
Close-up of YT's hands receiving the velvet box cautiously. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the soft creak of velvet. Cinematic heavy-honor style.

Close-up of YT cracking open the velvet box. Inside, on black satin, lie a pair of military dog tags on a chain, the metal worn smooth with age. The name ENZO BATTAGLIA stamped into them. Camera holds tight on the tags. Warm light. Audio: the soft creak. Cinematic heirloom-reveal style.
Close-up of YT's face looking at the tags, her expression genuinely moved. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her quiet: Uncle E. Cinematic emotion-breaks-through style.

Medium shot of Enzo, his face serious and warm at once. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: Enzo: Anyone who would give those a hard time. Anyone. They give you trouble, they see those. They remember I am with you. You are family kid. Understand. Cinematic formal-induction style.
Close-up of YT nodding, actual tears at the corners of her eyes, struggling not to let them fall. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: her: Yeah. Cinematic real-tears style.
Medium two-shot of Enzo laying his old heavy hand over YT's young one on the velvet box. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: his: Good. Cinematic don-approval style.

Medium tracking shot of YT looping the chain over her head, the dog tags settling under her shirt near her heart. Camera tracks the action. Warm light. Audio: the faint metallic clink. Cinematic wears-her-honor style.

Wide shot of a Metaverse cafe - a small idealized Parisian-style sidewalk cafe rendered in warm tones, little round tables, striped awning. Other avatars nearby are tastefully blurred. Camera pulls in. Soft cafe-light. Audio: virtual cafe ambience, a distant accordion. Cinematic Metaverse-cafe style.

Medium shot of JUANITA (the Mexican-American woman in her early 30s with long straight black hair, olive skin, wearing a plain white blouse and jeans, a coffee mug in her hand) seated at a small round table, a virtual latte before her. She is dressed simply, her hair loose. She is reading a book. Camera holds static. Warm cafe light. Audio: the faint accordion. Cinematic waiting-peacefully style.

Wide tracking shot of HIRO'S AVATAR (a lean mixed-race man identical to Hiro, in a black leather kimono, standing in a virtual cafe) walking up to the cafe, pausing at the edge of her table. Camera tracks. Warm light. Audio: his footsteps. Cinematic arrival-quiet style.
Close-up of Juanita looking up from her book, a real warm smile spreading. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Juanita: Hey. Cinematic soft-greeting style.
Medium shot of Hiro pulling out the other chair and sitting across from her. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: the chair scrape. Cinematic equal-seats style.
Close-up of Hiro's face, studying her like it's been a long time. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Hiro: Hey. Cinematic quiet-moment style.
Close-up of Juanita's hand closing the book and setting it aside. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the soft thump of the book. Cinematic undivided-attention style.

Wide two-shot of the two of them at the table, not talking, just looking at each other. The cafe sounds drift around them. Camera holds wide. Warm light. Audio: cafe ambience. Cinematic no-words-needed style.

Close-up of Juanita. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Juanita: I'm going underground for a while. With the clay tablets. There are more of them. I have to understand them all before someone tries again. Cinematic mission-continues style.
Close-up of Hiro's face, nodding. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Hiro: Yeah. I figured. Cinematic acceptance style.
Close-up of Juanita's hand reaching across the table to cover Hiro's. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: the soft contact. Cinematic connection style.
Close-up of Juanita, her smile a little sad. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: Juanita: This time, when I find something. I'll tell you. Cinematic partnership style.
Close-up of Hiro's hand squeezing hers briefly. Camera holds tight. Warm light. Audio: his: Okay. Cinematic trust style.
Medium shot of their hands slowly parting. Camera holds static. Warm light. Audio: cafe ambience. Cinematic graceful-letting-go style.
Wide shot of Juanita standing up, gathering her book. Camera holds wide. Warm light. Audio: the chair scrape. Cinematic end-of-meeting style.

Wide tracking shot of Juanita walking off across the virtual cafe terrace, one hand raised over her shoulder in a wave. Camera tracks her from Hiro's POV. Warm. Audio: receding footsteps. Cinematic bittersweet-exit style.
Wide shot of Juanita's avatar turning a corner of the virtual cafe and dissolving gently into light. Camera holds wide. Gold fade. Audio: her final faint laugh. Cinematic farewell style.

Wide shot of Hiro's avatar alone at the cafe table, a small smile on his face as he picks up his virtual coffee and sips. Camera pulls back slowly. Warm light. Audio: cafe ambience. Cinematic quiet-peace style.

Wide aerial shot of the Raft at sunrise, but different now - dozens of boats are peeling away from the central mass, outboards firing up, heading in every direction. The Enterprise sits dark and smoking. Camera pans high. Gold light. Audio: many distant outboards, gulls. Cinematic empire-dissolves style.

Wide tracking shot of a single battered fishing sampan, a small family aboard, motoring west toward Asia over the open ocean. Camera tracks alongside. Gold light. Audio: the steady putter of the outboard, soft voices. Cinematic freedom-at-sea style.

Medium shot of a Filipino father at the tiller and his small son on the bow, both faces lifted to the dawn, the father's hand on the boy's shoulder. Camera holds static. Gold light. Audio: wind. Cinematic future-reclaimed style.

Wide aerial shot of YT's suburban backyard. YT is in pajamas, sprawled on the grass beside the enormous gleaming Fido, tossing a tennis ball lazily. Fido catches it. Camera drifts up from above. Gold morning. Audio: her laughter, Fido's metallic-pleased rumble. Cinematic domestic-bliss style.

scene_name: Hiro Pulls Off Goggles In Unit
original_prompt: Wide shot inside the U-Stor-It storage unit. HIRO (the lean mixed-race man in his early 30s with cappuccino skin, spiky truncated dreadlocks, sharp eyes, wearing a clean black t-shirt and jeans, no katana, hair damp from a recent shower) pulls off his goggles, stretching, a calm expression on his face. Morning sun filters in through the half-open roll-up door. Camera holds wide. Gold. Audio: the creak of the chair, distant traffic. Cinematic hero-at-rest style.

Wide tracking shot of Hiro pushing up the roll-up door fully, stepping out into the morning. The sun is up properly now, warming the asphalt. Camera tracks. Full sun. Audio: birds, distant freeway. Cinematic fresh-day style.
Medium shot of Hiro tilting his face to the sun, eyes closed, allowing himself a moment. Camera holds static. Full sun. Audio: birds. Cinematic receiving-sun style.

Wide aerial shot pulling back from the U-Stor-It lot, rising over Compton, over Long Beach, over the LA basin sprawling and glittering in the morning sun. The Pacific catches the light at the horizon. Camera pulls up high. Gold-blue. Audio: a swelling orchestral theme. Cinematic city-wide style.

Wide aerial shot pulling up higher - the curve of the Earth becoming visible, the blue Pacific curving away, the coast a thin gold line. Camera keeps pulling up. Blue-gold. Audio: the orchestra swelling. Cinematic continental-pull style.

Wide shot of the entire Earth from low orbit, the terminator sweeping across the Americas, the Pacific a vast jewel. Camera holds wide. Star-field beyond. Audio: full orchestral theme. Cinematic planetary style.

Wide static shot as the Earth slowly fades to black, and the title SNOW CRASH rises in simple white typography at the center of a black field. Camera holds static. Black with white letters. Audio: the orchestral theme resolving to a final sustained chord. Cinematic end-title style.
Static shot of a fully black screen. Camera holds static. Black. Audio: the final chord fading to silence. Cinematic end style.
